name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Gazelka Out as Majority Leader
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gazelka_out_as_majority_leader&n=1)
---
Peter \-- Weakling Paul Gazelka resigned as Senate Majority Leader yesterday. His record of continual compromise to Tim Walz and the Radical Left will not be missed. Unfortunately, his resignation was done because he will be entering the race for Governor of Minnesota. Which makes him the third career politician to get in the race: Gazelka, Benson and Jensen. **Republicans in this state don't know how to stand up and fight! We're losing this country at a rapid pace, and "Minnesota nice" just won't work when you are going up against a political faction that's hellbent on destroying our freedoms.** That's why when the authoritarians at the front office of the state fair told us to take down our image of King Walz from our booth, because it was disrespectful, we told them "NO"! But then they stole it from us in the middle of the night, thinking we'd be like the weak Republicans (Gazelka types) that they're used to. They were in for an awakening. We created a new sign, put it back up, and continued building our grassroots army by the thousands each day! [](https://www.action4liberty.com/never_again_donation?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gazelka_out_as_majority_leader&n=2) But the state fair isn't where the real battle for liberty resides right now. Governor Walz, hospitals and even private businesses want to FORCE Minnesotans to get the experimental vaccine against their will. Heroic nurses who were on the frontlines last year, are facing unemployment if no one comes to the rescue. **So we came up with a plan. There's a Special Legislative Session at the end of the month where politicians will vote on a $250 Million Frontline Workers Pay bill. We say, "don't pass that bill unless it has Rep Mortensen's Stop Vaccine Mandates Amendment attached to it."** Politicians in St Paul can show us that they are willing to fight by signing the [**Stop Vaccine Mandates Pledge**](https://www.action4liberty.com/stop_vaccine_mandates_pledge?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gazelka_out_as_majority_leader&n=3) on our website. It's a promise from them to their voters that they won't vote for the $250 Million unless the Stop Vaccine Mandates Amendment comes with it. But gubernatorial candidates, and current senators, **Paul Gazelka and Michelle Benson REFUSE to sign the pledge**. Worse yet, they don't even have a plan to STOP vaccine mandates and would rather blame everything on the Democrats.
## That's not leadership. That's not want we want in the next Governor!
Peter, I need you to stand up for nurses and workers who are about to lose their job if the legislature does not act. Call, text or email Paul Gazelka and Michelle Benson and tell them to **pledge to you** to not vote for a $250 Million Frontline Workers Pay bill unless it has the Rep Erik Mortensen [**Stop Vaccine Mandates Amendment**](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=V4aZFzq5K-w4VJa-OkXRhTEcv1j4M28abuOZAzCZnWxBec-v0mwLjQjWjXri1Skww_PhIMyQ2_QxDfNofywEyQ&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gazelka_out_as_majority_leader&n=4) attached to it.
## **Here's what it does:**
**== > Restricts government, business, educational facilities and medical facilities from mandating vaccination as a requirement for work** **== > Stops vaccine passports implementation in Minnesota to protect private health rights** **== > Nullifies any President Biden executive orders or laws by the U.S. Congress in the state of Minnesota; makes them unenforceable** If Gazelka and Benson want to be Governor, they better get this one right. Otherwise, they're just part of the useless career politician class that never delivers results for our liberties. Demand they sign the [**Stop Vaccine Mandates Pledge**](https://www.action4liberty.com/stop_vaccine_mandates_pledge?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gazelka_out_as_majority_leader&n=5) and send the signed pledge to pledge@action4liberty.com
### Contact Paul Gazelka:
### Call or text: 218-821-9287
### Email: sen.paul.gazelka@senate.mn
### Contact Michelle Bensen:
### Call or text: 763-443-5690
### Email: sen.michelle.benson@senate.mn
**Sample Script** Dear ______, if you want to be the next Governor of Minnesota, you need to show us you are willing to fight for our liberties. Do not agree to pass the $250 Million Frontline Workers Pay Bill in the upcoming Special Session until you protect health care workers' jobs by adding the Stop Vaccine Mandates Amendment to it. Show us that you are on our side by signing the Stop Vaccine Mandates Pledge at this link: https://www.action4liberty.com/stop_vaccine_mandates_pledge. **Alternate Script** Dear ________, I will not support any candidate for Governor who does not sign the Stop Vaccine Mandates pledge. We demand you lead by example and refuse to vote for the $250 Million Frontline Workers Pay Bill unless it has the **Stop Vaccine Mandates Amendment** attached to it. Here's the pledge: https://www.action4liberty.com/stop_vaccine_mandates_pledge Gazelka and Benson will likely write back and tell you how this isn't possible - Democrats will never go for it. But don't let them bail on leading here. We first need Republicans (especially ones running for Governor) on board, then we can get the votes from Democrats. No team has ever refused to show up to the Super Bowl just because the odds are against them. Gazelka and Benson MUST do the right thing and SIGN THE PLEDGE! **We were able to End Walz' Emergency Powers back in June with Democrats in the House and Tim Walz in the Governor's Mansion because people like you made the phone calls and wrote the emails. It WORKS! ** And in case you weren't aware, this is the final weekend of the Minnesota State Fair. If you are coming, make sure to swing by our booth across from the Kidway. **Thank you to everyone who has supported our booth and operations. If you can't swing by, please continue supporting us and help us get our message to all the fairgoers by[donating today](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gazelka_out_as_majority_leader&n=6).** **In Liberty,** **** **Jake Duesenberg** **President, Action 4 Liberty** Action 4 Liberty 1920 Oakcrest Ave #5 Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gazelka_out_as_majority_leader&n=7).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gazelka_out_as_majority_leader&n=8).

name: Dr Neil Shah
subject: Media Lies About Ivermectin
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Dr
body:
| [](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_ywjlEt09belhBif-0dyVFfP5O8av4SyIIDSsyGPw1W831qwkFPoKxxxukEhtAtwdS903Vaw1n4BHuzGwQ_Kblg&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=media_lies_about_ivermectin&n=1) Peter, The media is relentless in their lies and misinformation. Did you see their response to popular podcaster Joe Rogan getting COVID? **Joe cut a short video on Instagram explaining how he came down with COVID after a recent trip. He immediately used a combination of drugs, including ivermectin, and vitamins to combat the virus. According to him, his symptoms rapidly improved.** But the media painted Joe as a controversial podcaster who took "a drug typically used on livestock". What the media and public health bureaucracy don't want to tell you, is that there is strong evidence of Ivermectin's effectiveness in treating COVID - ([Ivermectin in COVID-19 | FLCCC | Front Line COVID-19 Critical Care Alliance (covid19criticalcare.com)](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=WqQOFUIr_fCy6woKbIQ65QePrzRa2uaC7HcX8LfrneMnbzGHfQhVn8GnFy3_hMbvLu5uxcyVFgthL78yXJLLSg&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=media_lies_about_ivermectin&n=2). And it's a relatively safe drug that has been administered billions of times to humans around the world to combat diseases ranging from onchocerciasis to rosacea. In fact, the FDA has approved ivermectin for use in humans for helminthic infections as well as for the treatment of rosacea in cream form. **But that information would just distract from their fear and hopelessness narrative. The more breakthrough infections occur in the vaccinated, the more their narratives fall apart.** You see, we're losing this country because career politicians and their friends in the media and public health bureaucracy don't want to level with you and me. They'd rather keep taking your rights, controlling your life, and mandating you wear masks and get the shot just to keep your job. That's why I'm running against a pool of career politicians to become the next Governor of Minnesota. I dedicated my life to science and building a business (which Governor Walz shut down). We can't keep letting career politicians, who have failed us in the Minnesota Senate, pretend like they'll be different if they run for Governor. It's time for an outsider! **Join me as I continue traveling Minnesota standing up for your health freedoms against tyrants in government and medicine.** [****](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_ywjlEt09belhBif-0dyVFfP5O8av4SyIIDSsyGPw1W831qwkFPoKxxxukEhtAtwdS903Vaw1n4BHuzGwQ_Kblg&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=media_lies_about_ivermectin&n=3) If you would like to [help our campaign as a volunteer](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=iUaD1gacZHU3dYzSqkV0rHIMENRQT5AKoWG-e4wjsE6PmOi69xTq33Skw-UbFh4z&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=media_lies_about_ivermectin&n=4), please sign up. There's still time to work a shift at the State Fair. **Also, we're funded by the grassroots, not lobbyists and Special Interests like the career politician candidates.**[**Please consider donating $25, $50 or more to help us FIRE TIM WALZ!**](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_ywjlEt09belhBif-0dyVFfP5O8av4SyIIDSsyGPw1W831qwkFPoKxxxukEhtAtwdS903Vaw1n4BHuzGwQ_Kblg&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=media_lies_about_ivermectin&n=5) **Thank you!** **** Sincerely, Dr. Neil Shah Conservative Candidate for Governor [http://www.electneil.com/](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_ywjlEt09belhBif-0dyVFfP5O8av4SyIIDSsyGPw1W831qwkFPoKxxxukEhtAtwdS903Vaw1n4BHuzGwQ_Kblg&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=media_lies_about_ivermectin&n=6) Prepared and paid for by the Dr. Neil Shah for Governor Committee, 855 Village Center Dr #245, North Oaks, MN 55127
---

Derek,

**FIRST** , President Donald Trump created _**the Big Lie**_ that he won the 2020 election.

**THEN** , instead of refuting it, politicians like Gov. Ron DeSantis _**spread**_ the Big Lie far and wide.

**NOW** , _**you**_ have the power to do something about DeSantis' anti-democratic actions.

**Charlie Crist is running to defeat Gov. DeSantis.[Split an immediate contribution between Charlie Crist's campaign and Common Good VA so Charlie can win this election and kick Gov. DeSantis out of office.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mixF5rcIoDeVcI5r8EDMgruTQZ3Fl1SIKmOEFcNfVn2YJvt62Rhy4gjRW2GDSodgZRAthNCL9m78TPsrGT3uB8dWFUGvUIw_QnC82ZB2cXTYi_0ZBWt0EnoniSBf7VGzKsLbyYISROwpe0sslRGxnx6gDp72u5EU-a8BqgwPoRWgkykfStdnXX6xkK--bLYFm2Y8wuODs_m3Bw7-ZxcJViOR2XIJrpZa5_YIV342B8GwOMEMFrN5m4QdRCu7xs1NYcvGLuJghtrBGkzB_GW1kLWf0h57lG34dIw-Hv1Di7RGUew_Vky915Dbo9h9yLNLx5HuONniLDJTCTw-tJ2VmhcQ/3f0/h5KYXJEvRGOLIMjrnEQ5ug/h1/0HsWjDURG9EFjs88D-TrppUusqlVEsV71GUEh_eWz44)**

As _The Washington Post_ recently reported, “Dozens of candidates promoting the **baseless notion that the election was rigged** are seeking powerful statewide offices — such as **governor** , attorney general and secretary of state, which would give them authority over the administration of elections."

**DeSantis is one of the biggest culprits pushing the Big Lie, and he's damaging our nation and our democracy.**

**_We must remove him from office._**

As The Washington Post recently reported, “Dozens of candidates promoting the baseless notion that the election was rigged are seeking powerful statewide offices — such as governor , attorney general and secretary of state, which would give them authority over the administration of elections." DeSantis is one of the biggest culprits pushing the Big Lie, and he's damaging our nation and our democracy. We must remove him from office. \-- Team Crist | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Terry McAuliffe, please .

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: Biden is Compromised
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Biden's incompetence costs American lives |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=f981c34022&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

In 27 years in the Army, I saluted the Commander-in-Chief.

But this C-in-C either has no idea what is going on around him which demands use of the 25th Amendment to remove his executive authority, or he has committed crimes on par with a standard that demands impeachment.

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet [running to take back a nearly dead-even district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a941a6632b&e=afa21b7626), Florida’s 9th District in Orlando. It's currently held by Democrat Darren Soto, who refuses to criticize Biden. He is weak and vulnerable, just like Biden!**

It is becoming clear that,. one way or another, Biden is compromised.

This week, 13 young servicemen and women gave their lives to defend our citizens trapped in Afghanistan because of Biden's follies. They deserve to be remembered and honored.

Instead, Biden's Democrats try to meekly defend his incompetence and deadly confusion.
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=87cec831c8&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Even this weekend, with the bodies of the dead soldiers returning home, Biden couldn't be bothered. He was checking his watch in the ultimate act of disrespect.

Townhall reports:

_President Joe Biden and First Lady Jill Biden were at the Dover Air Force Base Sunday morning for the dignified transfer of 11 of the 13 service members who lost their lives on Thursday. While there, the president actually checked his watch. And he wasn't subtle about it, not even close to it._

Biden doesn't care about those he killed. As for me, I say, _Rest in peace, heroes.

Here they are:

For the Marine Corps, the deceased are:

Marine Corps Staff Sgt. Darin T. Hoover, 31, of Salt Lake City, Utah.

Marine Corps Sgt. Johanny Rosariopichardo, 25, of Lawrence, Massachusetts.

Marine Corps Sgt. Nicole L. Gee, 23, of Sacramento, California.

Marine Corps Cpl. Hunter Lopez, 22, of Indio, California.

Marine Corps Cpl. Daegan W. Page, 23, of Omaha, Nebraska.

Marine Corps Cpl. Humberto A. Sanchez, 22, of Logansport, Indiana.

Marine Corps Lance Cpl. David L. Espinoza, 20, of Rio Bravo, Texas.

Marine Corps Lance Cpl. Jared M. Schmitz, 20, of St. Charles, Missouri.

Marine Corps Lance Cpl. Rylee J. McCollum, 20, of Jackson, Wyoming.

Marine Corps Lance Cpl. Dylan R. Merola, 20, of Rancho Cucamonga, California.

Marine Corps Lance Cpl. Kareem M. Nikoui, 20, of Norco, California.

Staff Sergeant Darin T. Hoover, Cpl. Hunter Lopez, Cpl. Daegan W. Page, Cpl. Humberto A. Sanchez, Lance Cpl. Jared M. Schmitz, Lance Cpl. David L. Espinoza, Lance Cpl. Rylee J. McCollum, Lance Cpl. Dylan R. Merola, and Lance Cpl. Kareem M. Nikoui were assigned to 2nd Battalion, 1st Marine Regiment, 1st Marine Division, I Marine Expeditionary Force, Camp Pendleton, California._

Everyone in our country should be remembering their names today, and every other day!

No, they were not famous, but they should be. They should be honored as the heroes that they were. Serving at a dangerous and dusty airport in Afghanistan, while folks like you and I sit in the lap of luxury.

_**God bless our protectors. Always. **_
---
|
---
| **The Washington Examiner reports that one of the mothers of the dead Marines puts the blame squarely on Biden:**

_The mother of one of the slain Marines in Kabul last week said that people who voted for Joe Biden are responsible for her son's death._

_Kathy McCollum, mother of 20-year-old U.S. Marine Rylee, who was killed in the suicide bombings in Kabul along with 12 other service members, said on SiriusXM radio that “dementia-ridden” Biden is to blame for her son's death along with all who supported him.

“Twenty years and six-months-old, getting ready to go home from freaking Jordan to be home with his wife to watch the birth of his son, and that feckless, dementia-ridden piece of crap just sent my son to die,” McCollum said in the radio interview with host Andrew Wilkow on “The Wilkow Majority” show._

Biden's incompetence will go down in history. He's the worst President we ever had, and he should be impeached for what he's done.

_Here's my thing: I will hold Biden and his sycophants accountable. I will vote to impeach and investigate his corrupt regime. Democrat Darren Soto will not._

The American people have had enough and want him to be challenged. I will do that, as a part of the oath I took to the Constitution!

The Dems control all of the Federal government right now. We need to change Congress to hold Biden accountable! [Help me put a check and balance on Biden and Pelosi!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=8868ec0dd8&e=afa21b7626)

[Will you help me win my congressional seat](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=e60001763d&e=afa21b7626)? I got more votes here than any Republican ever had. It's a red-trending seat in a red-trending state! Now is the time!

Biden will destroy this country entirely if we don't stop him. Help me stand up to "Joke Biden"!

[Thank you for your support!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=7840dbd5bd&e=afa21b7626)
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=cbace0f07d&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=7170c8dc47&e=afa21b7626)
---
| P.S. I really need your help today, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - [WITH YOUR HELP](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=6cd4e80fb2&e=afa21b7626)! Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.
---

clean_body: | | | | | Folks \-- after we didn’t reach our August fundraising goal and asked this team to step up, you did. We’re almost halfway to our $4,500 extended deadline goal because of this incredible grassroots team. We still have a ways to go to meet our goal, but with your help, we can make it. This is one of the most watched races in 2022 and if we want to keep Nevada blue, we must fund essential campaign programs. | | | | | | | | | | | | | With your help, we can continue the forward momentum Steve’s created in Nevada, including: Expanding health care Investing in schools and teachers Standing with unions Protecting renters Creating economic opportunity Folks, if you give to Steve’s campaign right now, we’ll meet our goal today and continue building a strong team to keep Nevada blue. | | | | | | | | | | | | Thank you, Team Sisolak | | If you'd like to support Steve Sisolak for Governor, you can | Paid for by Steve Sisolak for Governor Steve Sisolak for Governor P.O. subject: We Want Trump

body:
America wants Donald Trump to be our President in 2024. Let’s make sure that happens. | [](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=5e6159c2b3bd4772bbe5e9b1a339a252&_e=ipPrw74PO6ZqQ241mtUwfz7r3nBrZCna0oaEEsFCtchHtewfdfdfPvowX_s-MYyFuB0hC1jHPn13LZcjxwbE4ttsWqJbx0J7TcukyK4fXIGJ1YMTbv14-Cw0allZG5e40pU6kgP1uaI_QqCVczE3kxdvW8yBilEbMoHHBv3mmIqkLCvk6jcCu2zwF7h72f8js_aQ9_Y3nji22tXLBePeDpmgY77n4B_M_u6YBhoF8slEhmzYWaW-QjLJVEfxbePbYHhRBbFMJ3tSwPIKwTfVeh7hm9GBeOABRkl7hV1JUS7N8PxmSMScjB7_JnHfXZFWLw25i_DCXx9vqoohckR0m5n6uJiWwiSENm2toeTlNjMdXgN0-ruBFLzqVPSycx89DM-4wbgpePXNL9Ddj-BILgREfkiUtKKsUvudm8ceuaUIvS_F0xzIvgRNO7cEcX_Q)

---
Fellow Conservative,

Failed economic policies, skyrocketing crime rates, out-of-control inflation, and a federal government that allows thousands of illegal immigrants with COVID-19 to pour across our borders _**every single DAY.**_

**THAT IS JOE BIDEN’S AMERICA.**
Last year we saw short-sighted people who voted for Biden just because he wasn’t “mean” or brutally honest like Trump, and they got a career politician who blames others. They are regretting their choice, and **they want Trump back as President in 2024.**

**I’ve been called "America's Toughest Sheriff" and that’s why I’m leading the** _**We Want Trump PAC**_ **because we can’t allow crime, corruption, and lazy politicians to ruin our nation.**

I’m a Korean War veteran. I spent my entire life in law enforcement from being a director of DEA at home and abroad to being Sheriff of Maricopa County, Arizona. When it comes to the safety and security of my fellow Americans, I don’t play games - and neither does Donald Trump. [**That’s why we need to lay the groundwork for his re-election in 2024 starting TODAY.**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=5e6159c2b3bd4772bbe5e9b1a339a252&_e=ipPrw74PO6ZqQ241mtUwfz7r3nBrZCna0oaEEsFCtchHtewfdfdfPvowX_s-MYyFuB0hC1jHPn13LZcjxwbE4ttsWqJbx0J7TcukyK4fXIGJ1YMTbv14-Cw0allZG5e40pU6kgP1uaI_QqCVczE3kxdvW8yBilEbMoHHBv3mmIqkLCvk6jcCu2zwF7h72f8js_aQ9_Y3nji22tXLBePeDpjtefnUOO9x3pV9cv_EtAxfFeWG5gqB61q8VZv15xyn1fEBeR2bo8NbFHE1-kqI4oUEoPApqOU5DdmewikgwNxj4OcwS5qT3UyLFXbpkwvm-1P3eRDxveb7eFSfNFFnjgrQa5FkS-LP7AWsb9RIG6GLUBmvINNzgsYzdVGXwfvZxdORrRlJZO56i_DRD28n6Re1Q9tOilg117xOH-JgATk17-lPjJDr6S7PPHZWCpBD)

[** ****AMERICA WANTS DONALD TRUMP, DO YOU? **](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=5e6159c2b3bd4772bbe5e9b1a339a252&_e=ipPrw74PO6ZqQ241mtUwfz7r3nBrZCna0oaEEsFCtchHtewfdfdfPvowX_s-MYyFuB0hC1jHPn13LZcjxwbE4ttsWqJbx0J7TcukyK4fXIGJ1YMTbv14-Cw0allZG5e40pU6kgP1uaI_QqCVczE3kxdvW8yBilEbMoHHBv3mmIqkLCvk6jcCu2zwF7h72f8js_aQ9_Y3nji22tXLBePeDkdZ8O8ztTYOvh7bWzYtOVvZHiBNY_VtBbcCmn1RTw6ktmNLVTLZQT8B01rKY5-TT1A-tbDAMi_0TNBqOighzV_h2JD9h5banSJiKIz10_NW_xz58wiB9dNCHWfpa68Rwus7hZQTPxYs7c_g41zs_SiiT2HxCDerNomnUQndu_XsjPZpWM3BYPDfJpdlcuIjTnOohUta_glQEGprPD4c3QL9zYO-0dXPrTeegra1OYZa)
_Joe Biden has already served nearly 40 years in politics_ , yet just a few months into “his presidency,” he’s already torching our country and running it into the ground. We cannot allow unemployment to stay at record highs, crime at record highs, or surging inflation that’s causing gas and grocery prices to skyrocket while Biden grabs ice cream and goes on vacation.

If you’re happy with Joe Biden, _then forget I emailed you._

But, if you’re sick of what Biden is doing to this country, [**then take action with me and let’s start winning back this nation for Trump.**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=5e6159c2b3bd4772bbe5e9b1a339a252&_e=ipPrw74PO6ZqQ241mtUwfz7r3nBrZCna0oaEEsFCtchHtewfdfdfPvowX_s-MYyFuB0hC1jHPn13LZcjxwbE4ttsWqJbx0J7TcukyK4fXIGJ1YMTbv14-Cw0allZG5e40pU6kgP1uaI_QqCVczE3kxdvW8yBilEbMoHHBv3mmIqkLCvk6jcCu2zwF7h72f8js_aQ9_Y3nji22tXLBePeDnrPG0vM7U6Ci-IHYkmR3S4g5b-2UisUoIrBPkHLaTAHEwSYztuz8fhV47trcgXJeDCGPSH_BtF5NWqBadqtRDbMaCar6AV1GUJ-i3Z_3_J9JXApvP5tLPmIAfEf7gO6GJ8-n3PnLvatVEPge2WosctGFuGM_TO_yK9gydjBA-JG8KzEGuLPu5fqdJl2oPytih6hF5eGybrF2o9YVibR1vjpZKcFqG3U2Goqee9vClUk) It starts in places like Arizona, Wisconsin, Michigan, Ohio, and North Carolina. [**It starts with just $10 or $20 to help pave the way for Trump.**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=5e6159c2b3bd4772bbe5e9b1a339a252&_e=ipPrw74PO6ZqQ241mtUwfz7r3nBrZCna0oaEEsFCtchHtewfdfdfPvowX_s-MYyFuB0hC1jHPn13LZcjxwbE4ttsWqJbx0J7TcukyK4fXIGJ1YMTbv14-Cw0allZG5e40pU6kgP1uaI_QqCVczE3kxdvW8yBilEbMoHHBv3mmIqkLCvk6jcCu2zwF7h72f8js_aQ9_Y3nji22tXLBePeDu5Au8z1Jccz8GC6Ih2Uy8Q2nekdzq-wVgv9K-zKfgQcx8NBO2vDfvyL8lXLImWdru7iJBmb6JqU3o9grvM68xy845W3jj-HP-Dz24QkV2EV9RR6cGilSu2widxaLeARw6im7kwKM5k3_MrV13nH_w4DNKyhSCX6k136_q7fsaUtLITgbhQj3d8yQeNri3vFTOYBtWnMXrS_Gqyf98a0v3IfeEdk0ixjRXgB410RtGkH)

**Fellow Conservative, if you want to see Donald Trump back in the White House in 2024, then help me get America to say “WE WANT TRUMP”** [**by donating today.**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=5e6159c2b3bd4772bbe5e9b1a339a252&_e=ipPrw74PO6ZqQ241mtUwfz7r3nBrZCna0oaEEsFCtchHtewfdfdfPvowX_s-MYyFuB0hC1jHPn13LZcjxwbE4ttsWqJbx0J7TcukyK4fXIGJ1YMTbv14-Cw0allZG5e40pU6kgP1uaI_QqCVczE3kxdvW8yBilEbMoHHBv3mmIqkLCvk6jcCu2zwF7h72f8js_aQ9_Y3nji22tXLBePeDtzMedHT7EDXtxZSxlnJp3dTuWNAGG88qEzoAbV_XMwRrpH6d-qFyT4Zgxd3oPybYGZQ5Hyz7jcqagLFxJerpvzB9VIZ8P6dlIWYh4UIwFJXMvvYByJDk_7v37SY2ERf_V5J5R3Wk26_Mk1un2VrLMYM5AGO16UnlnEngBeYQl59qJC3HDQO_A-NDpywjLQiomSbBMvv1rM6K1ehY2VdrAzesNbRC-ONte-SJY01JpEl)

name: SSG Brian Mast, U.S. Army (ret.)
subject: I served in Afghanistan. Joe Biden's words are as hollow as his head and his heart.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAST FOR CONGRESS
body:
|
---
| | [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58247122:J5V0382NH:m:1:3253819041:3A027568B7B784810EF9EE2AC3528530:r)
---
| Peter,

I lost two legs and a finger serving our country in Afghanistan.

Those of us that served, we fought for our country. We fought for those on our left and right, and we'll keep our heads high knowing that.

**But Joe Biden has abandoned our allies and betrayed the thousands of men and women like me who sacrificed tremendously in pursuit of peace. And now, he 's even blaming Donald Trump for the disaster Joe Biden himself caused.

Joe Biden's words are as hollow as his head and his heart.

In a minute, I'm going to ask you to **[**join me in fighting to defeat Joe Biden**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58247122:J5V0382NH:m:1:3253819041:3A027568B7B784810EF9EE2AC3528530:r)**, but first let me tell you how I know Joe Biden is full of shit...**

On the evening of September 19, 2010, I was moving across the battlefield in Kandahar, Afghanistan narrowing in on a high-value target. As a bomb tech, it was my job to clear the way for the rest of our team by finding and disposing of any improvised bombs. I found the last bomb by stepping on it, losing two legs and a finger in the process.
---
| [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58247122:J5V0382NH:m:1:3253819041:3A027568B7B784810EF9EE2AC3528530:r)
---
| The next thing I knew, I was in Walter Reed National Military Medical Center. I looked down to the end of my bed where my feet should have been sticking up, but they weren't. And every day since then when I wake up, I am reminded of my time in Afghanistan. The remnants of this war are going to last me the rest of my life, but I am one of the lucky ones--I made it home because my fellow soldiers refused to leave me behind.

Joe Biden has not lived up to the legacy of those men. He has abandoned Americans and our Afghan allies in Afghanistan.

**As a result, Joe Biden does not deserve to have the words "commander" or "chief" anywhere in his title.**

[**If you agree, please help me hold him accountable and stop his disastrous America Last agenda**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58247122:J5V0382NH:m:1:3253819041:3A027568B7B784810EF9EE2AC3528530:r)**:**
---

---
| [DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58247122:J5V0382NH:m:1:3253819041:3A027568B7B784810EF9EE2AC3528530:r "DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT")

name: Rand Paul
subject: the hacks at Facebook just deleted a Marine's Mother.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
**_BREAKING: The absolute hacks at Facebook suspended the account of a mother whose son was killed in action in Afghanistan. It's time to stand up to soulless censorship.

_****__** [**_JOIN ME: CHIP IN NOW >> _**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58247627:6BD4f82lN:m:1:3253819041:92308D553C025AEB9621A30258D74485:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58247627:6BD4f82lN:m:1:3253819041:92308D553C025AEB9621A30258D74485:r) | |
---
Peter, big tech has a big, liberal agenda.

They want to silence anyone who disagrees with them. ANYONE who threatens their power. And ANYONE who speaks out against their leader of choice, Joe Biden.

**_They made that as clear as day this week when the hacks at Facebook went as far as banning the mother of a fallen marine who wrote of her own negative experience with the president. _**

She criticized their guy - so they took down her Instagram account. _Just like that._

This kind of censorship is unacceptable, Peter. It's unamerican and it's a real threat to our liberty.

I'm working to put an end to the big tech tyranny and I need you to chip in NOW to help out:
**By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution:**
[**STAND WITH RAND: $10**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58247628:6BD4f82lN:m:1:3253819041:92308D553C025AEB9621A30258D74485:r)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $15**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58247629:6BD4f82lN:m:1:3253819041:92308D553C025AEB9621A30258D74485:r)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $20**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58247630:6BD4f82lN:m:1:3253819041:92308D553C025AEB9621A30258D74485:r)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58247631:6BD4f82lN:m:1:3253819041:92308D553C025AEB9621A30258D74485:r)
**If you've saved payment information with WinRed, your donation will go through automatically.**
We knew the social media mob was bad - even before today.

They've suspended my account, banned me on Google, tried to get my videos taken off the web...

_**_All for TELLING THE TRUTH!_**_

Now they're doing the same thing to a private citizen-a grieving mother who just lost her son in Biden's catastrophic withdrawal from Afghanistan.

It's absolutely despicable.

Of course, they're claiming the suspension was an "accident" now that they're getting negative press... but we know this game. And we know they **WON'T** stop until they **HAVE** to stop. That's why they need to hear from us.

**[I AGREE: CHIP IN NOW >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58247627:6BD4f82lN:m:1:3253819041:92308D553C025AEB9621A30258D74485:r)**

Here's the message we need to send to big tech elites at Facebook and Google and the rest:
-> You are not above the Constitution.
-> You cannot censor our right to free speech.
-> You WILL NOT silence us.
-> You WILL FAIL.

Why?

Because Americans are a free people. Our right to free speech cannot be bought and it cannot be erased.

**It is inherent. **

And let's not forget. This nation was created to protect freedom and liberty in moments just like this, when politicians and bureaucrats use intimidation and fear to silence dissent.

**I 'm not going to let them win. **

I'll continue being the champion against big tech censorship and for freedom, but it's not a fight I or anyone can do alone. That's why I need you to join me now by chipping in: **[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-2813976/](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58247627:6BD4f82lN:m:1:3253819041:92308D553C025AEB9621A30258D74485:r)**

Thank you in advance.

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

name: Marco Rubio
subject: Hey, Peter!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
My race in Florida will be the most closely watched race in the entire country.
|
---
| | | | Peter,

My race in Florida will be the most closely watched race in the entire country. Here's a play-by-play of what is going on in the fight for the Senate and for Trump's Legacy:

**In just the past few months:**
* Fox News has said my race could be the most expensive ever.
* CNN continues to move my race up on their list of Top 10 seats most likely to flip.
* The DNC and DCCC outraised their Republican counterparts in July.
* My opponent raised $4.6 million in Quarter 2 while spending over $2.2 million in Facebook ads since the launch of her campaign.
* I am pacing to land short of my Quarter 3 goal and will be outraised again if we don't improve in September.

**In the last 24 hours since I last emailed you:**
* My liberal opponent has spent almost $20,000 more on ads.

**And by the time you have read this far into the email: **
* A Democrat has already donated $10 to flip the Senate and reverse everything we built under President Trump.

This is what we are up against, Peter. **[To hold our own against the Democrats, will you donate $10 of your own to fight back against the Left?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58247705:JiGRB82Nv:m:1:3253819041:97A11DE2C36441C18A67E8DD1DF4FBC4:r "To hold our own

name: Max Steiner for Congress
subject: Thank you!
body:
Dear Friend,

Thank you for joining Max Steiner's campaign for Congress!

If you're ready to take the next step, here are three things you can do to help him defeat Doug LaMalfa.

1\. Stay updated with our campaign by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/MaxSteinerForCongress/).
2\. Make a [grassroots contribution](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ms-web-2022?refcode=signup-email-auto) to power our movement.
3\. Forward this email to a friend and let them know why you're supporting Max's campaign.

We'll be in touch soon,

Team Steiner

name: Team Cammack
subject: Stop the Hypocrisy
body:
The overwhelming hypocrisy of Nancy Pelosi and the Radical left hurts America.
---

| Friend,

The overwhelming hypocrisy of Nancy Pelosi and the Radical left hurts America.
While the liberal elite attempt to pass unconstitutional mask mandates and vaccine passports across the nation, they have no problem attending mask-less weddings and parties, which is why every American knows the left thinks the rules don't apply to them.

name: Team Franchot
subject: PHOTOS: Our Action-Packed Month of August!
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/logo.png]Hi Peter,
Over the month of August, Peter Franchot has been hard at work traveling to all corners of the state to build our growing coalition of support. With the month now behind us, we’re very excited to give you a photo recap of how we’re taking this people-powered movement to new heights.
The enthusiasm and energy that we’re seeing as Peter Franchot visits communities across Maryland has been truly heartwarming. Time and again, we’re hearing a similar refrain from Marylanders in the streets, at their doors, at festivals and markets, and at parks and restaurants: “We know you. We trust you. We’re with you.” Every week, Team Franchot is busy speaking to voters, and every day, Peter Franchot’s broad coalition of support grows a little bit stronger. To everyone who joined us in the month of August, we extend our warmest thanks to you for your continued support of this movement. And to those who haven’t been able to meet with us yet -- we’re just getting started!
We’ve had an action-packed summer of events, and we’re looking forward to all that we have in store as we head into the Fall season. If you’re able, will you chip in to help Peter Franchot maintain his momentum in this competitive race? We rely on supporters like you to keep us going, and with your help, we can continue the important work of building our statewide coalition in the weeks and months ahead. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/augustinreview?amount=20.22]
CHIP IN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/augustinreview?amount=20.22]Thank you,
Team Franchot
Here’s our recap of August:
On August 1, we started off the month with a great evening in Howard County, where Peter shared his vision for the future of our state with supporters and friends in West Friendship.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/augustinreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/augustinreview?amount=20.22]On August 3, Peter joined local leaders in Baltimore to celebrate the 40th Anniversary of the National Aquarium.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/augustinreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/augustinreview?amount=20.22]Later that evening, Peter joined friends, supporters and community leaders at events in Silver Spring and Takoma Park to participate in National Night Out and help build stronger ties between our communities and police departments. Team Franchot was also on the ground in Prince George’s County with the Suitland Action Team.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/augustinreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/augustinreview?amount=20.22] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/augustinreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/augustinreview?amount=20.22]On August 7, Peter visited the Hispanic Church of God in Owings Mills to meet with Church visitors during the distribution of food to families in need.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/augustinreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/augustinreview?amount=20.22]On August 14, Peter visited the Emmanuel Adult Medical Day Care Center in Catonsville to commemorate Korean Independence Day with members of Maryland’s Korean American community.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/augustinreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/augustinreview?amount=20.22]Later on, he headed to the Howard County Fair & Parade, where he had a great time speaking with voters, meeting farmers, and enjoying some fried Oreos. Special thanks to Howard County Fair Association President Mickey Day for his hospitality, and to the Howard County Democrats for the warm welcome when we stopped by their booth!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/augustinreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/augustinreview?amount=20.22]On August 18, Peter headed to the Eastern Shore for the Maryland Association of Counties Summer Conference. He started off his visit by touring the Harry & Jeanette Weinberg Intergenerational Center at Delmarva Community Services (DCS) in Cambridge, a great nonprofit that helps people with disabilities and special needs maintain their dignity and an independent lifestyle. Later that day, he traveled to Downtown Salisbury, where he visited local businesses with Mayor Jake Day to recognize their contributions to the city’s revitalization.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/augustinreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/augustinreview?amount=20.22]We ended the day with a Meet and Greet with voters at Evolution Craft Brewing. Special thanks to Mayor Jake Day, County Councilmember Josh Hastings, Salisbury Councilmember Michele Gregory, and Berlin Councilmember Shaneka Nichols for joining us!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/augustinreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/augustinreview?amount=20.22]On August 19, Peter began the next day by touring the MACo Convention Center to speak with conference attendees about the vitally important role that local governments are playing in pandemic response and recovery. Later that afternoon, we had a great event with Team Franchot allies and supporters at Liquid Assets bistro. Special thanks to elected officials like Jill Carter, Aisha Braveboy, Pam Queen, Nick Charles, Andrew Friedson, Sandy Bartlett, Andre Johnson and Steven Johnson for joining us!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/augustinreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/augustinreview?amount=20.22]On August 21, Peter attended the Chesapeake Region Accessible Boating (CRAB) Cup Sailboat Regatta in Annapolis. CRAB is a wonderful organization providing accessible boating opportunities to people with disabilities, wounded veterans, and local youth from underserved communities.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/augustinreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/augustinreview?amount=20.22]The next day, he went to an action-packed event hosted by the District 33 Democratic Club to speak with voters. Warm thanks to Club President Alexandra Novak for hosting a great event, and elected officials like Delegate Heather Bagnall for their friendship.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/augustinreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/augustinreview?amount=20.22]On August 24, Peter visited the Michael E. Busch Annapolis Library to recognize Capital Gazette photographer Paul W. Gillespie for his moving photography exhibit honoring the memory of those we lost at the Capital Gazette over three years ago. (Photo Credit: Jeffrey F. Bill/Capital Gazette).
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/augustinreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/augustinreview?amount=20.22]On August 26, Peter headed to Owings Mills for a Back to School event at Deer Park Elementary School, where he made it clear that the needs of our students, parents and teachers will be front and center in his gubernatorial administration.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/augustinreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/augustinreview?amount=20.22]Afterwards, he headed to Columbia to join the Howard County Muslim Council for a great end of summer event, and was joined by Delegate Courtney Watson, Senator Guy Guzzone, and Howard County Schools Superintendent Michael Martirano. He rounded out the evening with a visit to Delegate Pam Queen for her event with voters in Sandy Spring.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/augustinreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/augustinreview?amount=20.22]On August 27, Peter started off the morning with a great discussion with Delegate Eric Ebersole on the steps he’ll take to improve educational outcomes for all Marylanders as Governor.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/augustinreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/augustinreview?amount=20.22]Afterwards, he headed to the historic Pikesville Armory to learn more about its exciting future as a vibrant public space for communities in Baltimore City and County.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/augustinreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/augustinreview?amount=20.22]Next, Peter and his wife Anne made their way to Lutherville-Timonium to enjoy a wonderful afternoon with visitors at the Maryland State Fair. Special thanks to the Maryland Democratic Party for giving us such a warm welcome at their booth!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/augustinreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/augustinreview?amount=20.22]On August 28, Peter visited the Charles County Wine and Music Festival in La Plata, where he had a great time speaking with festival goers about how we’re going to change the way that government does business in 2022.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/augustinreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/augustinreview?amount=20.22]On August 29, Team Franchot joined the Baltimore County Leaders and Citizens for an event welcoming new members. We recognized the BCLC for their outstanding community service, and Peter was honored to have been inducted as their honorary member.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/augustinreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/augustinreview?amount=20.22]On August 31, Peter rounded out an action-packed August by joining the Well Church of Baltimore for a virtual meeting to discuss the bold steps he’ll take to level the playing field on education for Black Marylanders -- including making sure our HBCUs have the resources that they need to thrive and prosper.

clean_body: [ Peter, Over the month of August, Peter Franchot has been hard at work traveling to all corners of the state to build our growing coalition of support. With the month now behind us, we’re very excited to give you a photo recap of how we’re taking this people-powered movement to new heights. The enthusiasm and energy that we’re seeing as Peter Franchot visits communities across Maryland has been truly heartwarming. Time and again, we’re hearing a similar refrain from Marylanders in the streets, at their doors, at festivals and markets, and at parks and restaurants: “We know you. We trust you. We’re with you.” Every week, Team Franchot is busy speaking to voters, and every day, Peter Franchot’s broad coalition of support grows a little bit stronger. To everyone who joined us in the month of August, we extend our warmest thanks to you for your continued support of this movement. And to those who haven’t been able to meet with us yet -- we’re just getting started! We’ve had an action-packed summer of events, and we’re looking forward to all that we have in store as we head into the Fall season. If you’re able, will you chip in to help Peter Franchot maintain his momentum in this competitive race? We rely on supporters like you to keep us going, and with your help, we can continue the important work of building our statewide coalition in the weeks and months ahead. [] CHIP IN [ you, Team Franchot Here’s our recap of August: On August 1, we started off the month with a great evening in Howard County, where Peter shared his vision for the future of our state with supporters and friends in West Friendship. [ August 3, Peter joined local leaders in Baltimore to celebrate the 40th Anniversary of the National Aquarium. [ that evening, Peter joined friends, supporters and community leaders at events in Silver Spring and Takoma Park to participate in National Night Out and help build stronger ties between our communities and police departments. Team Franchot was also on the ground in Prince George’s County with the Suitland Action Team. [] [ August 7, Peter visited the Hispanic Church of God in Owings Mills to meet with Church visitors during the distribution of food to families in need. [ August 14, Peter visited the Emmanuel Adult Medical Day Care Center in Catonsville to commemorate Korean Independence Day with members of Maryland’s Korean American community. [ on, he headed to the Howard County Fair & Parade, where he had a great time speaking with voters, meeting farmers, and enjoying some fried Oreos. Special thanks to Howard County Fair Association President Mickey Day for his hospitality, and to the Howard County Democrats for the warm welcome when we stopped by their booth! [ August 18, Peter headed to the Eastern Shore for the Maryland Association of Counties Summer Conference. He started off his visit by touring the Harry & Jeanette Weinberg Intergenerational Center at Delmarva Community Services (DCS) in Cambridge, a great nonprofit that helps people with disabilities and special needs maintain their dignity and an independent lifestyle. Later that day, he traveled to Downtown Salisbury, where he visited local businesses with Mayor Jake Day to recognize their contributions to the city’s revitalization. [ ended the day with a Meet and Greet with voters at Evolution Craft Brewing. Special thanks to Mayor Jake Day, County Councilmember Josh Hastings, Salisbury Councilmember Michele Gregory, and Berlin Councilmember Shaneka Nichols for joining us! [ August 19, Peter began the next day by touring the MACo Convention Center to speak with conference attendees about the vitally important role that local governments are playing in pandemic response and recovery. Later that afternoon, we had a great event with Team Franchot allies and supporters at Liquid Assets bistro. Special thanks to elected officials like Jill Carter, Aisha Braveboy, Pam Queen, Nick Charles, Andrew Friedson, Sandy Bartlett, Andre Johnson and Steven Johnson for joining us! [ August 21, Peter attended the Chesapeake Region Accessible Boating (CRAB) Cup Sailboat Regatta in Annapolis. CRAB is a wonderful organization providing accessible boating opportunities to people with disabilities, wounded veterans, and local youth from underserved communities. [ next day, he went to an action-packed event hosted by the District 33 Democratic Club to speak with voters. Warm thanks to Club President Alexandra Novak for hosting a great event, and elected officials like Delegate Heather Bagnall for their friendship. [ August 24, Peter visited the Michael E. Busch Annapolis Library to recognize Capital Gazette photographer Paul W. Gillespie for his moving photography exhibit honoring the memory of those we lost at the Capital Gazette over three years ago. (Photo Credit: Jeffrey F. Bill/Capital Gazette). [ August 26, Peter headed to Owings Mills for a Back to School event at Deer Park Elementary School, where he made it clear that the needs of our students, parents and teachers will be front and center in his gubernatorial administration. [, he headed to Columbia to join the Howard County Muslim Council for a great end of summer event, and was joined by Delegate Courtney Watson, Senator Guy Guzzone, and Howard County Schools Superintendent Michael Martirano. He rounded out the evening with a visit to Delegate Pam Queen for her event with voters in Sandy Spring. [ August 27, Peter started off the morning with a great discussion with Delegate Eric Ebersole on the steps he’ll take to improve educational outcomes for all Marylanders as Governor. [, he headed to the historic Pikesville Armory to learn more about its exciting future as a vibrant public space for communities in Baltimore City and County. [, Peter and his wife Anne made their way to Lutherville-Timonium to enjoy a wonderful afternoon with visitors at the Maryland State Fair. Special thanks to the Maryland Democratic Party for giving us such a warm welcome at their booth! [ August 28, Peter visited the Charles County Wine and Music Festival in La Plata, where he had a great time speaking with festival goers about how we’re going to change the way that government does business in 2022. [ August 29, Team Franchot joined the Baltimore County Leaders and Citizens for an event welcoming new members. We recognized the BCLC for their outstanding community service, and Peter was honored to have been inducted as their honorary member. [ August 31, Peter rounded out an action-packed August by joining the Well Church of Baltimore for a virtual meeting to discuss the bold steps he’ll take to level the playing field on education for Black Marylanders -- including making sure our HBCUs have the resources that they need to thrive and prosper. name: Doctor Jason Martin
subject: Did you see that press conference yesterday?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Jason Martin for Tennessee
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nowthistn [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nowthistn]
Hi, Peter!
Yesterday, news broke that Tennessee leads all fifty states in COVID19 cases per capita. And how did our current governor respond? By hosting a press conference to tell us he was going to continue with the same strategy - which let me be clear, is no strategy at all.
More than 13,000 Tennesseans have died from COVID19, at least 19 of our public schools are closed due to outbreak, and our hospitals are past capacity. Governor Lee's inaction is hurting our families, schools, and economy.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nowthistn [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nowthistn]
Earlier in the week, my interview with "Now This" published. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nowthistn] The interview outlines my final call to action- Bill Lee's refusal to act. Yesterday's dodgey press conference from Governor Lee reinforced that Tennessee needs a governor who will work relentlessly to protect our lives and livelihoods.
Take a quick moment to watch the interview and learn more about about my call to action. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nowthistn]
It's time for a change. When I took my hippocratic oath, I pledged, “First, do no harm.” When elected Governor of Tennessee, I will continue to uphold this oath and the oath of the office of Governor. Unlike Governor Lee, I will uphold my oath of office and lead for the people of Tennessee.
Please join myself and our campaign in this fight for Tennessee. $5, $10, $25, $100 - every cent goes toward defeating incompetent leadership and winning the governor's race. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nowthistn]
Together, Tennessee thrives.
— Doctor Jason Martin

| | Peter,

Thank you so much for your support last week as we faced our August deadline. I am astounded by the outpouring of support we received as we continue to ramp up our grassroots efforts in preparation for 2022.

I also want to thank those of you who have attended our Napa drive-in movie event. Your support is what keeps us going. Thank you!

While we still have a long way to go towards progress, please know that I will continue to work hard every day and fight for what’s right. My team is focused on helping my fellow Democrats so we can continue to pass progressive policies and hold onto the majority in Congress.

I’m so grateful to have you on our team. Thank you for all that you do!

Mike Thompson

name: Diego Rodriguez
subject: Let me introduce myself
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Diego for AG
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35155642/304209941/-1716317403?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmZkMzBjYi1jYjBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=erqYfpWa5EG6570uT7DxOuw1ElPzry0FA1PkC1B_4nU=&emci=34796498-4301-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=4ffd30cb-cb0c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=10950315)

Hello —

My name is Diego Rodriguez and I'm running to be the next Attorney General for Arizona.

**Right now, Arizona is in crisis**. The State Senate's "audit" has given conspiracy theorists (whose claims have been repeatedly proven false) access to millions of ballots and cost taxpayers millions of dollars. The governor has gone from an anemic COVID response to an outright hostile one. And our current AG is playing to a radicalized right-wing base instead of _fighting for the people_.

I've had **enough**.

It's time to bring _transparency, accountability, and integrity_ back to the AG's office. That's why I'm running to be the People's Attorney.

My story begins in a trailer in Wyoming — my childhood home. Growing up there with my six siblings, **economic hardship and discrimination was a daily reality**. These experiences are why I fought for policies in the State House like a $15 minimum wage and a worker’s right to organize, and I'll keep fighting those fights as AG.

Law school brought me to the great state of Arizona. Though I've stayed a lifelong Democrat, I've worked as a prosecutor, defense attorney, civil attorney, and state legislator since my arrival here. **I know the Arizona criminal justice system inside and out**, which means I'm ready to lead the fight to address its biggest challenges.

But no good fight gets finished alone. That's why I'm reaching out to see if you'll join my team.

[**Will you help me build a better, more just Arizona by becoming a founding donor on my campaign?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35155646/304209946/2127152568?refcode=X_090321_DRIntro_A&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmZkMzBjYi1jYjBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=erqYfpWa5EG6570uT7DxOuw1ElPzry0FA1PkC1B_4nU=)

Here's to the good fight!

\-- _Diego_
| **Rep. Diego Rodriguez is running for Attorney General to be the People's Attorney, focused on our needs instead of partisan stunts. As a lifelong Democrat, a prosecutor, a defense attorney, and now as a State Representative, Diego is the most experienced and most qualified candidate that we can trust to fight for our rights.**

[**Will you join Team Diego by chipping in a few dollars now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35155649/304209949/2127152568?refcode=X_090321_DRIntro_A&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmZkMzBjYi1jYjBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=erqYfpWa5EG6570uT7DxOuw1ElPzry0FA1PkC1B_4nU=)

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35155650/304209951/2127152568?refcode=X_090321_DRIntro_A&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmZkMzBjYi1jYjBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=erqYfpWa5EG6570uT7DxOuw1ElPzry0FA1PkC1B_4nU=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35155656/304209953/2127152568?refcode=X_090321_DRIntro_A&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmZkMzBjYi1jYjBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=erqYfpWa5EG6570uT7DxOuw1ElPzry0FA1PkC1B_4nU=)

subject: Republicans are spending MILLIONS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
they’re all in to win Virginia
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35155907/304210593/-2023814932?refcode=20210903.3_GR_9P&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmZkMzBjYi1jYjBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3ZXxaxL29GYgaQJOatek5sOoX0Tsc-JVfaezHLXHTco=)

| | Derek, Virginia is 2021’s highest profile race and Republicans are building an army to defeat Terry.

Case in point is the Republican National Committee. Recently, they announced they’re planning to pour millions of dollars into this race, and with early voting just two weeks away, I’m worried we’re not doing enough.

That’s why Terry launched a one-day goal of raising $75,000 before midnight tonight ... but candidly, our progress so far is _dismal._

# **— we just finalized our September Priorities Survey. Will you take a few seconds to fill it out before Labor Day weekend?**

---
[**TAKE THE SURVEY »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/f0df93f9e83dd47e/1462f18ed95cec32c3d6b838967d376c)
The U.S. Senate comes back into session this month, and there’s a lot of work to do — from stopping the Democrats’ out of control $3.5 TRILLION spending bill, to investigating Joe Biden’s Afghanistan debacle, to continuing our investigation into the pandemic’s origins.

And I want to know what matters most to YOU.

While Democrats take their cues from elites in the Swamp and liberal donors, we’re listening to working Kansans and Americans.

[**So, will you take our September Priorities Survey? It will only take a few seconds, and I’ll be reviewing the responses over the weekend.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/f0df93f9e83dd47e/9cabb560b253e62ac3d6b838967d376c)
** **
Have a great Labor Day weekend!
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/f0df93f9e83dd47e/00cc253c0c37730ec3d6b838967d376c)
Senator Roger Marshall
[**TAKE THE SURVEY »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/f0df93f9e83dd47e/c930e1acb08a4263c3d6b838967d376c)

[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/f0df93f9e83dd47e/ac79cb7cf4654606c3d6b838967d376c)

Doc is defending life. He's standing for our jobs, our families, and our faith.

**He's taking our Kansas values to the U.S. Senate, but he can't get it done without your help.**

We know we send a lot of emails, but we're counting on you. The truth is, these emails are the key to keeping our supporters updated on ways they can make a difference.

However, if you'd like to receive fewer emails or unsubscribe, [click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go.cfm?a=1&eid=80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694&c=37973&jid=f0df93f9e83dd47e&d=55ed9643e8d595cec3d6b838967d376c&u=http://ci.criticalimpact.com/procenter/procenter.cfm?action=profile&eid=80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694&c=37973&jid=f0df93f9e83dd47e).

clean_body: | | | — we just finalized our September Priorities Survey. Will you take a few seconds to fill it out before Labor Day weekend? The U.S. Senate comes back into session this month, and there’s a lot of work to do — from stopping the Democrats’ out of control $3.5 TRILLION spending bill, to investigating Joe Biden’s Afghanistan debacle, to continuing our investigation into the pandemic’s origins. And I want to know what matters most to YOU. While Democrats take their cues from elites in the Swamp and liberal donors, we’re listening to working Kansans and Americans. Have a great Labor Day weekend! Senator Roger Marshall | | Doc is defending life. He's standing for our jobs, our families, and our faith. name: Marisa Wood for Congress
subject: Thank you!
body:
Dear Friend,

Thank you for joining Marisa Wood's campaign for Congress!

If you're ready to take the next step, here are three things you can do to help her defeat Kevin McCarthy.

1\. Stay updated with our campaign by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/MarisaWoodforCongress/).
2\. Make a [grassroots contribution](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mw-web-2022?refcode=signup-email-auto) to power our movement.
3\. Forward this email to a friends and let them know why you're supporting Marisa's campaign.

We'll be in touch soon,

Team Wood

body:
| 🎵 do you remember? 🎵
---
[ ](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..s5Pc31qJR1qmEeWKg9ax8N22zkk7DaDK531HalTgYJ0)

## **DANCING IN SEPTEMBER:**
****_There *never was a cloudy day* with these live trainings! 🌎💨🔥_ _Even if you’re not an Earth, Wind & Fire fan like us, this month’s lineup of events is guaranteed to get you in the swing of things. 🕺_

* * *

[**🚨 FIRST: Q &A with Reps. Lauren Underwood and Katie Porter **](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..hbx6w47u8wddeD61moFTRcM8a2EEBYMrVo6H_OXxqv4)
**Tuesday, September 14, 12pm ET** Let’s face it: with the 2021 elections and 2022 midterms right around the corner, we need to roll up our sleeves and get to work.

Join us for **_the unofficial Build Blue Week kickoff event_** with our new co-chairs for a conversation on what Democrats need to do in this next election cycle to build a better future.
| [RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..rpMb9rYLkLmvl_3n6iVh9P_wMaNRApoVCUWEVobo6eY)
---

* * *

[ ](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..F4NIE39TlJj7pSZru-1JnYbyQNdCrer23cpazBYoMpk)
---

[**🔵 COMING UP: Build Blue Week**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..I5cdEtKtHJVdORppKMit_se1_txrjzdewXvW9g7KyYY)
**Saturday, September 18 - Friday, September 24**
Are you a current or aspiring staffer, candidate, or volunteer who wants to connect with Democratic leaders around the country to build on the skills _you_ need to _WIN?_
Join us for our first-ever [**Build Blue Week**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..FoxDu4iuOejLouofkpSKQ3rZQ2BibREYU8MbG33W_Dg), which will include an array of panels, trainings, and Q&As to take your skills to the next level. Check out the full lineup today!

[GO NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..5szvZ8VgA3ty04j6kXo-mvxlWh0oPVl5hqoaH6MG744)
---

* * *

[**How to Build a Political Campaign Field Plan**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..y202hldShTcp23nHXLD7ev5_NSrJqPMtB5OqW64D-ts)
**Tuesday, September 7, 1pm ET**
Field operations are one of the most integral aspects of a campaign 𑁋 so make sure you’re doing it right! From canvassing, to recruiting volunteers, mapping out your field goals in a comprehensive plan is essential to _winning_.

[RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..5vh1pETD2rnty_J1sKdiBx93my0Yvrfa4hkwo0QXodc)
---

* * *

[**Do You Want to Run for Office?**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..WpBCHS40TmvoreurGqRTZNvBTIT3gMeXy7YhM1Un6H4)
**Tuesday, September 7, 8pm ET**
There’s a lot to consider before putting your name on the ballot 𑁋 what office to run for, when to run, and _how_ you want to run your campaign.

Tuesday’s training is dedicated to helping you determine if you want to run and, if so, how to get your campaign started!

[RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..u7ZNSPENmhbT7ni3uIRwdcmBUjpnfKlVwyq-AZ4VCsY)
---

* * *

[**How to Build a Political Campaign Fundraising Plan**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..MuyUyqZrtnr4FoM2ZCVJ6Y73ZnwbePFAkR4nHT2PO7A)
**Wednesday, September 8, 1pm ET**
Money. 💸 You can’t run a campaign without it 𑁋 and more importantly, you can’t run a campaign without planning how you’re going to raise it.

That’s why Wednesday’s training is so valuable! You’ll learn how to build a fundraising plan that meets the unique needs of your campaign and how to use it to reach your fundraising goals.

[RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..w_DVhUewiNkLEhBCsWPvy5sIPSLm66ZZUQ_d8-mbMGI)
---

* * *

[**How to Build a Political Campaign Communications Plan**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..HlHsL6ky7Rhp52Ke4g6NdovKgbanEiU4rw8RoUHBjVY)
**Thursday, September 9, 1pm ET**
As a candidate, you need to make your voice heard. With a strong communications plan, you can reach your audience and build support in no time.

At Thursday’s training, we’ll explain what goes into this plan and how you can build a strategy that works for your campaign!

[RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..AnCMqRHHOYPuOOF2qpf_gqmjFPfhKNIeL7QKB7Bux3Q)
---

name: Derek Marshall
subject: A climate denier
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
**As California burns, Jay Obernolte is trashing the best climate change legislation Congress has on the table.** He’s launching a partisan attack on the very reconciliation bill that would provide the most meaningful resources to green our infrastructure and start to transition away from fossil fuels. But it’s not just the climate.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35157436/304216654/-528688338?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDQ1NTAwMS1kMDBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OYICcOWcjLGASC-LdaE9EzfZxvgFmbrqDLgTl3Lh_50=)

It’s the corporate tax. It’s funding the IRS. It’s childcare and healthcare. They’re all on the chopping block. Thankfully, Jay Obernolte is in the Republican minority, which means the House doesn’t need his support to pass the budget reconciliation.**But he’s still the Congressman for California’s 8th district.[If you want to see this district flip from red to blue next November, we need your support now. Can I count on you to donate?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35157437/304216657/-528688338?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDQ1NTAwMS1kMDBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OYICcOWcjLGASC-LdaE9EzfZxvgFmbrqDLgTl3Lh_50=)**

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35157438/304216660/-528688338?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDQ1NTAwMS1kMDBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OYICcOWcjLGASC-LdaE9EzfZxvgFmbrqDLgTl3Lh_50=)
Here’s the thing. I don’t believe Obernolte is actually representing the people of this district. We’re on the frontlines of the climate crisis and almost every day, it seems like there’s a new wildfire springing up. **We know what will happen if we don’t invest in climate action and do it now. **
If I was in Congress, I would do whatever it takes to push for the bold climate action we need to protect my community and others like it. We don’t need a representative who denies the reality of the climate emergency we are living through.**We need someone who acts with the urgency that this crisis demands, and that’s exactly why I’m running for Congress.[If you can donate today, we’ll be in a better position to defeat this Trump-backed opponent and take his seat in Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35157439/304216661/-528688338?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDQ1NTAwMS1kMDBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OYICcOWcjLGASC-LdaE9EzfZxvgFmbrqDLgTl3Lh_50=)**
Can I count on you?

In Solidarity,

**Derek Marshall**
* * *
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35157440/304216662/-528688338?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDQ1NTAwMS1kMDBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OYICcOWcjLGASC-LdaE9EzfZxvgFmbrqDLgTl3Lh_50=)

name: Team NextGen
subject: Sign up for text updates
body:
Text NEXTGEN to 25998

| | Friend, **As one of our most engaged supporters, we want you to be the first to know when news breaks or when there are important election updates.** Can you take a moment to sign up for our texts? We’ll send you invites to local events, rapid response actions, and information on upcoming elections. **Text NEXTGEN to 25998 to sign up for periodic updates via text message so we can notify you about our latest actions.** When news breaks, we need to get the message out with just a moment’s notice. With your help, we’ll be able to quickly mobilize our community and spread the word. Together, our community has the power to create lasting change — and we want to make sure you’re part of the team. **Want to stay up to date with our latest campaigns? Text NEXTGEN to 25998 to get periodic action alerts and information about upcoming elections or events.** Thank you, Team NextGen
---

San Francisco CA 94104-3503 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | [unsubscribe](https://email.everyaction.com/unsubscribeUnique/cd05d6c2-330c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed/935be942-d00c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzViZTk0Mi1kMDBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rVDZnn-BBXXgq93e3PHOVWsPe1XZFhgIpIKKwVmXr8w=&id=109799863)

Can you take a moment to sign up for our texts? We’ll send you invites to local events, rapid response actions, and information on upcoming elections. Text NEXTGEN to 25998 to sign up for periodic updates via text message so we can notify you about our latest actions. When news breaks, we need to get the message out with just a moment’s notice. With your help, we’ll be able to quickly mobilize our community and spread the word. Together, our community has the power to create lasting change — and we want to make sure you’re part of the team. Want to stay up to date with our latest campaigns? Text NEXTGEN to 25998 to get periodic action alerts and information about upcoming elections or events. name: Erica Smith
subject: Senator Joe Manchin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
Senator Joe Manchin said he won’t vote for the $3.5 trillion budget reconciliation bill. I’ll bet that made his corporate donors happy.
#
This is OUTRAGEOUS!
Last night, Senator Joe Manchin said he won’t vote for the $3.5 trillion budget reconciliation bill. I’ll bet that made his corporate donors happy.
**I want Senator Manchin to know:** That’s a betrayal of everything we worked for in 2020 to remove Donald Trump from office and deliver urgent change to the American people.
**I want you to know:** If I were in the U.S. Senate right now, I’d proudly cast the deciding YES vote on the reconciliation bill to finally get this done.
And that’s not all I’d be a YES vote on!
_You could count on Senator Erica Smith to vote YES on abolishing the Jim Crow filibuster, raising the minimum wage, guaranteeing voting rights for Black people, and SO much more._
[**_Can you make a $5 contribution to send me to the U.S. Senate where I’ll ALWAYS vote on the side of the American people? I’m REALLY counting on your support this September, especially with the biggest FEC fundraising deadline yet at the end of the month._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/13789?refcode=em20210903-411&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=411%2E3698%2Euw7DKe)

Thank you so much for your support.
— Erica ❤️

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210903-411-footer&t=21&refcode2=411_3698_uw7DKe&akid=411%2E3698%2Euw7DKe)**

subject: They’re Baaaa-aacckkkk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
We knew the Democrat Party would not give up so easily and they haven’t. Like the antagonist from a low-budget horror franchise, Democrat.. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/the-resiliency-of-hoosiers-470806?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| _**They’re Baaaa-aacckkkk**_ We knew the Democrat Party would not give up so easily and they haven’t. Like the antagonist from a low-budget horror franchise, Democrat power grabs have risen from the dead and are coming after our elections again... just like we said they would. Back in June, we worked together to defeat the disastrous HR/S 1 bill pushed by Pelosi and The Squad. That bill was designed to weaken state election laws, thus opening the door for widespread fraud. Thankfully, we were able to thwart their attempted federal hijacking of our elections. But they weren’t done.

Late last month, the Democrat-led House of Representatives passed HR 4, which is just HR/S 1 in a different disguise. It has the same rotten core as the defeated legislation and attempts to achieve the same outcome: federal takeover of state elections. The Democrats’ biggest target? State voter ID laws. Thankfully, the vast majority of voters are on our side with this as research shows nearly 80% of voters support voter ID laws and over 60% support states administering their own elections. I wrote an op-ed that dives deeper into HR 4 and it is linked below. This just shows that as long as the Democrat Party has razor thin majorities in Congress, they will not give up on their power grabs. We defeated them the first time, and I am confident we can defeat them again.

Thanks
Kyle **_Photo: _**_Kyle Hupfer presents a Chairman’s Award to Indiana Federation of Young Republicans Chair Jeffrey Cummins last month._
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
|
---
|
---
| **_Building One Indiana for All_**
**Governor Holcomb** visited with the Ellettsville Chamber of Commerce to discuss READI, rural economic growth, and supporting our veterans. Indiana is on a roll, and Ellettsville's potential is sky high.

**Governor Holcomb** was joined by Adjutant General, Brig. Gen. R. Dale Lyles to discuss the use of Camp Atterbury as a temporary site to house Afghan evacuees. You can watch the full briefing here: [https://twitter.com/GovHolcomb/status/1433058193605808130](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=dfff049733&e=1acd9bb3d6)

**_Photos:_**_ Gov. Holcomb attending the Ellettsville Chamber of Commerce luncheon. Gov. Holcomb and __Adjutant General, Brig. Gen. R. Dale Lyles discussing the arrival of Afghan evacuees._
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Hupfer: HR 4 is Just Another Power Grab**_ Chairman Hupfer, who serves as RNC General Counsel and is fighting to defend election integrity across the country, penned the following op-ed for Real Clear Politics calling out continued Demcorat efforts to subvert our elections. HR 4 is nothing short of a Demcorat Power grab.
_**"Don’t fall for their partisan lies: H.R. 4 has the same rotten core as H.R. 1 and would make our elections far less secure. H.R. 4’s goal is to eviscerate the right of states to manage their own elections with appropriate transparency and ballot-security safeguards." --Chairman Kyle Hupfer**_
You can read his entire piece here:
[https://www.realclearpolitics.com/articles/2021/08/26/dont_be_fooled_hr_4_is_just_another_power_grab_146308.html](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f8d897f456&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
| _**Senator Todd Young Op-Ed**_ Senator Todd Young, wrote the following op-ed for USA Today about Biden's failure to safely withdrawal from Afghanistan and his shameful decision to leave Americans behind.
_**"America can no longer with a straight face say we leave no one behind. And the people I’ve spoken with are seething, embarrassed, ashamed." -Senator Todd Young**_
You can read Todd's entire op-ed here:
[https://www.usatoday.com/story/opinion/2021/09/01/biden-left-americans-afghanistan-todd-young/5665849001/](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=820a145ca3&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Diversity Series Applications**_ Applications are now open for the second class of the Indiana Republican Diversity Leadership Series. [Click here to apply](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=885fa5fbe4&e=1acd9bb3d6).
---
|
---
| _**Upcoming Republican Events**_
[September 3](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a0660dbd7c&e=1acd9bb3d6): Noble County Republican Women Fall Rally
[September 7](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=cc5c4e32c0&e=1acd9bb3d6): Newton County Lincoln Day Dinner
[September 9](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=469cf44daa&e=1acd9bb3d6): LaGrange County Lincoln Day Dinner
[September 10](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f31dab0bfa&e=1acd9bb3d6): Noble County Annual Golf Outing
