**Senator Mike Braun** [presents resolution to Indiana Veteran's Home](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a60f65da8f&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congresswoman Jackie Walorski** [applauds Supreme Court's pro-life decision](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=47cf247762&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Jim Banks **[Praises the Supreme Court's pro-life decision](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=4e4709ea4c&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Jim Baird** [criticizes Democrat's spending sprees](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=be54e19840&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congresswoman Victoria Spartz** [criticizes Democrat spending](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=4a79db887b&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Greg Pence** [meets with Lawrenceburg Mayor Mollaun](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3398c1f118&e=1acd9bb3d6)

body:

| | Peter, Nearly 8 months after the January 6 insurrection, we _still_ don’t have clear answers about how this deadly attack happened -- or who was behind it. Thankfully, the House’s January 6 Commission is hard at work. In their first hearing, they heard new, heart-breaking testimonies from Capitol police officers that revealed the full extent of the toll of this attack. [**There’s so much more to learn, but national Republicans are spreading lies about the Commission and undermining its work. Will you sign on to show your support for the January 6 Commission and demand the answers we deserve?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35165372/304235377/257492615?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzc0YjEzMi1kYjBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sBh1QE42RZ4Vb70PzMn8HGky1QUWklmMMO4y_vZRzG0=&emci=3b74b132-db0c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=3c74b132-db0c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=22032259) | | | [Sign on »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35165373/304235378/257492615?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzc0YjEzMi1kYjBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sBh1QE42RZ4Vb70PzMn8HGky1QUWklmMMO4y_vZRzG0=&emci=3b74b132-db0c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=3c74b132-db0c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=22032259)
---
The truth about January 6th is personal to us in Western NC -- because our Republican Congressman Madison Cawthorn helped incite the insurrection.
It’s no surprise that Cawthorn voted against the commision. He gave a speech the morning of the attack and riled up the crowd.
In the months since, he’s only gotten closer to Trump and has continued to spread the dangerous conspiracy theories that led to the violence.
**In fact, Cawthorn was recently caught on camera calling the domestic terrorists who attacked the Capitol “political hostages” and said he was “actively working on” a second event.**

clean_body: | = | | Peter, Nearly 8 months after the January 6 insurrection, we still don’t have clear answers about how this deadly attack happened -- or who was behind it. Thankfully, the House’s January 6 Commission is hard at work. In their first hearing, they heard new, heart-breaking testimonies from Capitol police officers that revealed the full extent of the toll of this attack. | | | The truth about January 6th is personal to us in Western NC -- because our Republican Congressman Madison Cawthorn helped incite the insurrection. It’s no surprise that Cawthorn voted against the commision. He gave a speech the morning of the attack and riled up the crowd. In the months since, he’s only gotten closer to Trump and has continued to spread the dangerous conspiracy theories that led to the violence. In fact, Cawthorn was recently caught on camera calling the domestic terrorists who attacked the Capitol “political hostages” and said he was “actively working on” a second event. | | The Commission will hold its second hearing soon. name: Mike Collier
subject: hypocrisy and cruelty
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/89772/images/Logo%20%282%29.png]
Hello friend —

I love Texas with all my heart — every inch of it. That’s why the last few days, if not weeks, of watching Dan Patrick and Greg Abbott destroy our great state have been absolutely exhausting and heart-wrenching.

Every day, we wake up to a new crisis of Dan Patrick and Greg Abbott’s making. A failing grid, children and educators in virological warzones, local governments stripped of their powers, an assault on democracy, permitless carrying of weapons, and women denied the right to control their own destinies. Their hypocrisy and cruelty have no limits.

Folks, they want us to give up and throw in the towel, but we cannot back down.

I will not let Dan Patrick and Greg Abbott destroy our Texas.

I will fight with everything I’ve got for the state I love because Texas is every bit worth the fight.

Will you join me? Will you fight with me, county-by-county, to stand up for our constitutional rights, to return competence to government, and to take back our beloved state?

Now more than ever, Texas needs you.

God bless,

— Mike

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc-email-sep2021?refcode=mc-em210903-abortionbill]
The Collier Committee
P.O. Box 14648
Humble, TX 77347
United States

body:

Still, the utter incompetence of the Afghanistan drawdown has forced me to submit new articles of impeachment against Joe Biden for dereliction of duty.** **We must impeach and remove Old Joe Biden before he does MORE damage to our nation 's security.** | | [Join the Fight - Donate Today](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/KlDCHLmkYL6GIKg3sJwXWw/892Vyi25DVwx1abtdn9be2kQ "Join the Fight - Donate Today")

**American soldiers are now dead because Joe Biden is unable or unwilling to execute the duties of the Office of President.**
It is our duty to remove him from office before more people die.
**[Fight for AMERICA: Join me and donate $25, $50, $100, or even $1,000 TODAY! We can't waste a single moment in taking our nation back.](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/u4iks892iWeldFV0b1mNP8qw/892Vyi25DVwx1abtdn9be2kQ "Fight for AMERICA: Join me and donate $25, $50, $100, or even $1,000 TODAY! We can’t waste a single moment in taking our nation back.")**
I am fighting for you in Congress, and I need your help to ensure we can stop Joe Biden before it's too late.
God Bless America,

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Did you show up to work?
body:
When I announced my run against Do-Nothing Republican Dan Webster . . .
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/SZvn1jUunZCD9Hl1Lr9SHA/0n5V892YyxWqPsu4SVFztufQ)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/SZvn1jUunZCD9Hl1Lr9SHA/0n5V892YyxWqPsu4SVFztufQ) So get this.

When I announced my run against Do-Nothing Republican Dan Webster in Florida's 11th district, my opponent's response to the media about the race came from a lady named Jaryn Emhof.

Here's what she said:
"Mr. Webster never takes reelection for granted - he works hard every day to serve his constituents and campaigns hard every year."
So according to Ms. Emhof, Do-Nothing Dan is working hard every day and . . . uh . . . yeah . . . he's working hard every year too.

Sure, Dan Webster is working super hard . . . except when Democrats want to vote on their sham impeachment against President Trump, then Dan Webster is nowhere to be found and couldn't be bothered to cast a vote.

**Actually, in the first half of 2021, Congressman Daniel Webster has missed 21.3% of his votes!**

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/SZvn1jUunZCD9Hl1Lr9SHA/0n5V892YyxWqPsu4SVFztufQ)

There's a reason why he's gained the nickname "Do-Nothing Dan".

Don't you think that Members of Congress have an obligation to show up and do their jobs just like we have an obligation to show up for work throughout our careers?

**Would you have a job or still be in business if you didn 't bother to show up 20% of the time?**

What if you skipped out on working 29% of the time like Dan Webster did in the 1st Quarter of 2020?

Or how about 27% of the time like he did in the last quarter of 2018?

Do-Nothing Dan's rampant absenteeism stretches back to 2013, after he won his second term in Congress.

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/SZvn1jUunZCD9Hl1Lr9SHA/0n5V892YyxWqPsu4SVFztufQ)

I guess that "can't get fired" mentality effects our politicians too.

Want me to work for you instead? I'd be happy to, [**just give me a hand to get to Washington**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/SZvn1jUunZCD9Hl1Lr9SHA/0n5V892YyxWqPsu4SVFztufQ).

**I 'll even make you a stern promise, when elected, as long as I'm not behind bars, dead or damn-near dead on my death bed, I won't be missing any votes as a member of Congress.**

And that's an easy promise to keep.

[**If you 're able, please chip in and help fund my campaign today. I'd really appreciate it.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/SZvn1jUunZCD9Hl1Lr9SHA/0n5V892YyxWqPsu4SVFztufQ)

Thank so much,

Laura Loomer

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.

LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460

| | Derek, earlier today, Terry announced a one day goal of raising $75,000 online to help us get ready for the start of early voting in Virginia.

I’m getting on a Zoom call with Terry later this afternoon to update him on our progress, but as of right now, it’s shaping up to be a tough call because we are nowhere near where we need to be if we’re going to reach our goal.

_**[Will you chip in just $20 or $30 right now so I can deliver some better news to Terry?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35166033/304237424/-2023814932?refcode=20210903.4_EW_9Q&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjY4NjY4ZS1kYzBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cFHlDxvshEqFU5YqdtuRtQ-tslN-_zih_esYrERKQ4s=)**_

clean_body: We aren’t where we need to be | | | = | | Derek, earlier today, Terry announced a one day goal of raising $75,000 online to help us get ready for the start of early voting in Virginia. I’m getting on a Zoom call with Terry later this afternoon to update him on our progress, but as of right now, it’s shaping up to be a tough call because we are nowhere near where we need to be if we’re going to reach our goal. = Look, this is about more than just giving Terry some good news on a Zoom call. If we don’t pick up the pace right now, we’re going to have to talk about cutting our ads spending, drastically reducing the reach of our voter mobilization efforts, and limiting our get out the vote campaigns. And Derek, with early voting beginning in just two weeks and a recent poll showing a tied race, this is the absolute worst time to be having those conversations. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Ellie Warner Finance Director Terry for VA =** Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. Paid for by Terry for Virginia

name: Charlie Crist
subject: We need to keep talking to voters about Gov. DeSantis’ failure to lead
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
Right now Florida leads the nation in new COVID cases and deaths. |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35166435/304238775/786059518?refcode=20210902_f_1_fl&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGNmMzkwYS1lMDBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QtSXb8-OKSMk_UZu4Vh29qw6GcIpIBE2pNUwGP605S8=)
---

Friend,

Right now Florida leads the nation in new COVID cases and deaths. And yet rather than taking the steps needed to keep Floridians safe, Gov. Ron DeSantis is going to war against common sense and threatening to defund schools where they’re asking kids to wear masks.

We need to keep talking to voters about Gov. DeSantis’ failure to lead in the pandemic, so our campaign launched a new TV ad. **[Can you make a donation so we can keep talking to persuadable voters and defeat Gov. DeSantis? It’s essential that Floridians know there’s a better option -- and that I have a plan to build a Florida for All.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35166436/304238778/786059518?refcode=20210902_f_1_fl&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGNmMzkwYS1lMDBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QtSXb8-OKSMk_UZu4Vh29qw6GcIpIBE2pNUwGP605S8=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35166437/304238779/786059518?refcode=20210902_f_1_fl&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGNmMzkwYS1lMDBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QtSXb8-OKSMk_UZu4Vh29qw6GcIpIBE2pNUwGP605S8=)
---
The last thing we need right now is a governor who’s actively working _against_ the very policies that could keep Floridians safe in the midst of a deadly pandemic. What we need is common sense and to do what’s right -- and that’s what I’m committed to doing as governor.

But winning this race isn’t going to be easy. We need to stay engaged with voters all over the state if we’re going to build the kind of grassroots movement we need to defeat Gov. DeSantis. And that’s why I’m asking for your support right now.

**If you can, please take a moment to make a donation and help give us the support we need to defeat Gov. DeSantis.**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Between his handling of the economy, coronavirus, Afghanistan and the southern border, it seems to me tha I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | [](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=39e333b85f5543c39f5dfdb487e65ee1&_e=1XAoe3RTGzBlTj-21Z_PVflFCmjkG5GFrxfIE9VE7uVhfLclTxKyP84aFsBvCXeqBdjXkC9po3lAMNCnp1YZx5roDYfoZBVMt45edimacimqaoE00I6Em6-1YK7G3n92b_xDU5J1qJmgu1wHGg-fRTG7XDeBMexZPKV-sGoa7iwhjx8DnKaPhtNH7iPnAHysZ1z6bynV_ok_Hw1lybLG0r9VDx8y6MS98EEcHtsapdG1ntYhe1FzxjqQNsd7cp7kXyxID_j91VORF-uu9TDWLsFo1aLh3TpzXO2VKXJ2uuyHIKNlKLKVuyRpRqbtD13RVrnbkKkbSHm9OnWyqlfARpLGDxrl7EWlTeimZnPHys3QoNEGgj8yMOMVKMVS8BMCHUwggG0ba5r8M_wApTsI9OUjMO7Uc2thYhwW08Fk_Iwn2R8mTpt4o5zNmAXFu_zF_xQWEB1hDiYaI3VuuS5dCTSurdvHVYDpKdCDiFhkp_R12LIzR1Fgirw7od2Fg3dwM8yWz7GNktJ2X0i4vCCme2Xucp_JCWQWQfrGIA-coGVv2bo_brnlM99mrBHw8t_AP-LYGSwcFm_5S8xrzy4vUwHyy2U2Rb0m8a9ZV4buQhaFoiXMlbVfsdYawOES6ihGVQmwxdQ-yJbwHon9taJymqroFpj_sd9VyeSQx4YXd00%3D)

Peter,

Tuesday afternoon President Biden spoke to the American public about his chaotic withdrawal from Afghanistan, and for me as an Afghan veteran, it cemented in my mind that he is absolutely unfit for office.

The American presence in Afghanistan didn’t have to end the way that it did. The fault for what we’ve all witnessed with horror over the last several weeks – and the horrors that we’ll continue to witness as the Taliban once again turns Afghanistan into a safe-haven for terrorism – lies squarely with the current president and his senior advisors.

Not President Trump.

Not former secretary of State Mike Pompeo.

Not Republicans in Congress.

**[Watch the full clip of my interview with Fox below, then I’m asking you to sign onto my petition calling for an official investigation into how our country’s leaders let the Taliban become one Central Asia’s most powerful militaries overnight](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=39e333b85f5543c39f5dfdb487e65ee1&_e=1XAoe3RTGzBlTj-21Z_PVflFCmjkG5GFrxfIE9VE7uVhfLclTxKyP84aFsBvCXeqBdjXkC9po3lAMNCnp1YZx5roDYfoZBVMt45edimacimqaoE00I6Em6-1YK7G3n92b_xDU5J1qJmgu1wHGg-fRTG7XDeBMexZPKV-sGoa7iwhjx8DnKaPhtNH7iPnAHysZ1z6bynV_ok_Hw1lybLG0r9VDx8y6MS98EEcHtsapdG1ntYhe1FzxjqQNsd7cp7kXyxID_j91VORF-uu9TDWLsFo1aLh3TpzXO2VKXJ2uuyHIKNlKLKVuyRpRqbtD13RVrnbkKkbSHm9OnWyqlfARpLGDxrl7EWlTeimZnPHys3QoNEGgj8yMOMVKMVS8BMCHUwggG0ba5r8M_wApTsI9OUjMO7Uc2thYhwW08Fk_Iwn2R8mTpt4o5zNmAXFu_zF_xQWEB1hDiYaI3VuuS5dCbMwD6jjKGoT8jp7SAcZvWnUC0-6YDHGgHXNfSn2J3j1p3IJwZzu66YO-1J3P6PJpRyzEq5tJpuhSKXPe0FiB6oU3kdb9mXWPmijnygDYaYd4Sv65JvA8jnnTkiiVaAWJ5-yM0uMvhM-FwAQyiLYAeu1-GS_2K9rG5gfS3NHZIYUIs208PeGI1AgF5zfXYfAM3twhB8zvT2ewbgQxq2PJVs%3D)**.

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: This is longer, but I hope you'll read
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miGFL7wQvJlY0GjVnSFZeNWukNqZGfTMDdRAZWRlIjOfHflJIR2Xpy_WH9YOwUnM8F6WvrbpZRp6ZYwiiVBFt3LFMx-PfGjQj4wd4kDqAc9UMVf5IId4fwP6LJ7hXaCPTlupuQJYfedBfUGhlchHWYUm4XrZTmQmYS5-cy80HWmxJj9UhcAjIpVvxtV4zDknhccnTkalESwastixCVfm0u-XHgMi3HEGqtNMAYxGj9RNR_Ni1bwvLdwuIuCqrz-vxmeIWBUPDevsj3yTndaXUfeQYE73BkcIDfqZZ2pnK8gYUn_2LulX3q9EXH_shypqQz/3f0/Hqbs17hiQ6inOy8rqVPD2g/h0/1vQDBt64bONXKLb-o-2eoOSVPxKltwZkMJ20uex81N0)
This is a longer email, Derek, but I hope you'll read it.

Right-wing billionaire and Donald Trump's former Secretary of Education, Betsy DeVos, came to New Hampshire to rally Trump's far-right base. She is just one of the many Trump allies trying to unseat me and flip the Senate red.

During Betsy DeVos' confirmation hearing for Secretary of Education back in 2017, she demonstrated a complete lack of understanding and support for the public education system – and it was clear that she was unqualified to serve as secretary of education. **At her confirmation hearing, I specifically questioned Ms. DeVos on whether she would enforce the Individuals with Disabilities Education Act. Not only did she refuse to say she would, but she also demonstrated that she was unaware that this landmark civil rights law was a federal law.**

Unfortunately, she didn’t improve upon that disastrous confirmation hearing during her tenure in the Trump administration – pursuing policies that undermined public schools in New Hampshire and across the country. From proposed funding cuts to her efforts to implement a voucher system, **DeVos ignored the needs of both educators and students in an attempt to dismantle our public education system.**

I’m writing today because it has been my honor to represent New Hampshire in the U.S. Senate, and I’m not done fighting for a more robust public education system. I only won my last election by 1,017 votes, and New Hampshire’s State Senate and State House both flipped from blue to red last year. Republicans know this, and DeVos' visit is a clear attempt to unseat me by rallying Trump's far-right base. **If we lose in New Hampshire, Democrats have no chance of holding our narrow majority.**

Having Donald Trump and his allies fully invested in this race is bad news. [**I hate asking for money, but my campaign is falling behind our goal, and we need the funds to fight back against Republican attacks. Will you please split $25 between my campaign and Common Good VA to help us win in New Hampshire and protect our vulnerable Senate majority?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miGFL7wQvJlY0GjVnSFZeNWukNqZGfTMDdRAZWRlIjOfHVOJSaT0DbcbClKv6EOKaj7U9Y70CuDtW5sdSHGnMk6fclrcyd2ctQhSXf83zBrBbzloKpv8xlQJ-gFg4OxFqPEs3JHqY3k0YdiVnfV0mAjpcNGpwGXrrWfOg3k0c5lf6aWbeaH52IE2TBtrxRW2JbAb2MpVUf85aEcdcRtOG6NH9uy7zRFZo3qeoTKiUZrVNukH3ObZDIjZAUPU3ZzyY4kNRpFOVJcWiRDje8LbCuRNJCN-hbWb-0r4-CvdDL1ArwFYpVdwZ813npWQcOJYgd1r89o9KjNkdGNCS7ntQ-Sw/3f0/Hqbs17hiQ6inOy8rqVPD2g/h1/XzEpE4sp2WyN-97SYYnW28PEmFlrLq6K0YCI_fNl0Nw) **[ Donate $25 ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miGFL7wQvJlY0GjVnSFZeNWukNqZGfTMDdRAZWRlIjOfHVOJSaT0DbcbClKv6EOKaj3awK__0nEqMEoDbmDrQCV9xZU01XA2irpfEB70s962xXSZTjnClYIY_b3zwpkaYKkxqhVJ4qsRz1fTMWdUlDoW5i-8T3giRmO518in4oM3olP4LtAn3W0PQ7J1XMUzAyXXZpOZ9s7mRLTaBR3rRCHm-aGdJrtDBsA6O4yYMw_GFgVe2jfR5N3Elg8fGtLWly5YuJQWis_SYmgfdfkNQw2qVgSjPUcZ0ZF-5ivvAtSeLk2FB9IXeH8SFzTyyPwD2XFAR5tDWihb5CcdYy6xRygA/3f0/Hqbs17hiQ6inOy8rqVPD2g/h2/xfeyp54Hy6mKV9rFL1NtrtNcwMtqHH-IIeCRAr4jnI0)

clean_body: | | | This is a longer email, Derek, but I hope you'll read it. Right-wing billionaire and Donald Trump's former Secretary of Education, Betsy DeVos, came to New Hampshire to rally Trump's far-right base. She is just one of the many Trump allies trying to unseat me and flip the Senate red. During Betsy DeVos' confirmation hearing for Secretary of Education back in 2017, she demonstrated a complete lack of understanding and support for the public education system – and it was clear that she was unqualified to serve as secretary of education. At her confirmation hearing, I specifically questioned Ms. DeVos on whether she would enforce the Individuals with Disabilities Education Act. Not only did she refuse to say she would, but she also demonstrated that she was unaware that this landmark civil rights law was a federal law. Unfortunately, she didn’t improve upon that disastrous confirmation hearing during her tenure in the Trump administration – pursuing policies that undermined public schools in New Hampshire and across the country. From proposed funding cuts to her efforts to implement a voucher system, DeVos ignored the needs of both educators and students in an attempt to dismantle our public education system. I’m writing today because it has been my honor to represent New Hampshire in the U.S. Senate, and I’m not done fighting for a more robust public education system. I only won my last election by 1,017 votes, and New Hampshire’s State Senate and State House both flipped from blue to red last year. Republicans know this, and DeVos' visit is a clear attempt to unseat me by rallying Trump's far-right base. If we lose in New Hampshire, Democrats have no chance of holding our narrow majority. Having Donald Trump and his allies fully invested in this race is bad news. I'm fighting to give New Hampshire families a brighter future by strengthening public education, expanding the Child Tax Credit, protecting health care, and more. But there's still much work ahead – and if Republicans regain control of the Senate, they will undo all of the progress we've made so far. Thank you so much. With every good wish, Maggie Hassan | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . name: Mark Kelly for Senate
subject: Mark is lucky
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Mark has received more individual, small-dollar donations than any candidate in the country during the first six months of the year.
#

Mark is lucky.
He has you.
Most candidates have to spend extraordinary amounts of time fundraising.
But again, Mark is lucky. He has you.
Mark has received more individual, small-dollar donations than any candidate in the country during the first six months of the year.
Not only does that support help him fend off expensive attacks - like ones on air right now. But it allows him the time and space to be the best Senator he can be, which is the top priority.
But because the majority of Mark’s donations come from emails like this one, it means that we have to send out these emails from time to time. And today is one of those days:
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to Mark Kelly’s campaign for Senate? We will put it right to work fending off some of the expensive attack ads running against Mark in Arizona right now.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-sept21?refcode=em210903-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1270_6688874_mzKh9Z&akid=1270%2E6688874%2EmzKh9Z)
**[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-sept21?refcode=em210903-1-15&t=2&refcode2=1270_6688874_mzKh9Z&akid=1270%2E6688874%2EmzKh9Z)**
Thanks in advance for responding. It means a lot to Mark.
\- Team Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=1270%2E6688874%2EmzKh9Z).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

Terrorists are celebrating Joe Biden's catastrophe in Afghanistan. Afghan friends are being murdered. Afghan women and girls are facing a lifetime of oppression and abuse. Even Biden's fan club in the media can't defend his debacle.

And that's up to us.

Their budget is going to add another trillion dollars to our out-of-control national debt. Their phony "infrastructure" bill is a back-door Green New Deal. Their education policies promote Critical Race Theory and anti-American propaganda.

House Freedom Fund needs to post a HUGE fundraising number this quarter to send a signal Washington can't ignore.

_**We have to win back the House in 2022**_ - from the Democrats and the RINOs who help them. When campaign finance reports are released, both parties will look to see where the momentum is.

If conservatives step up now, Democrats will cut and run from the president's failed agenda. We can start making an impact before the campaign heats up!

**[But we can 't do it without you. Please give as generously as you can, right now!](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zvftokk65sh7jvaer1fis3ho0u1bk4g9egnotlt8_rp22sh2s8i66pj0cdie2ob4sjh2bs)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: 15 million ballots
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
That's how many mail ballots unaccounted for |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=99ee9a65a8&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,

Word just in – about 15 million mail in ballots were unaccounted for in the 2020 Presidential election.

This is unacceptable. And I’m here to stand up for election integrity in one of the key swing states in which FRAUD ousted our rightful President.

**My name is Mark Finchem. I am a State Representative in Arizona and am the vanguard leading the charge in the fight for election integrity in Arizona, in the greatest grassroots movement of the millennium! And now I am running for Secretary of State in Arizona. **

**_I paid for important hearings out of pocket when no one else would pay for them. I listened when others covered their ears and I spoke up when others stayed silent._**

[_Please donate today to stand up for election integrity in Arizona!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=1ad86081c0&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=fb4bc97dff&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| If you are done with the propaganda from those who stole the election – it’s time to stand up and speak out.

“Safest and most secure?” That is absurd.

In fact, the Public Interest Legal Foundation delivered a research brief highlighting a few key findings regarding the 2020 election.

In particular:
* In 2020, there were 90.6 million ballots sent
* Of these 90.6 million ballots, 1.1 million were undeliverable
* 560,814 were rejected
* 14.7 million were “unknown.”

**These numbers don’t mean anything without additional clarity, so let me quote the brief directly on its definition of “unknown”**

_The U.S. Election Assistance Commission asks local officials how many ballots were not returned as voted, were undeliverable, or were otherwise “unable to be tracked.” The USPS Inspector General most recently reported that only 13 percent of mail ballots in the 2018 General Election used the official tracking system. This means there is a wide variety of things that can happen to a ballot in the “unknown” column. A ballot can be put in the wrong mailbox and land in an unfriendly neighbor’s trash. It can be thrown out with your unpaid bills. It can be left outside for the wind to carry the last mile (like seen in Nevada in 2020). Election officials simply do not know what happened. Unknown ballots are the greatest blind spot in the American electoral system._

**It should be noted that there were only 5.9 million ballots that were “unknown” in 2016, in which President Trump rightfully won.**

Let’s do some math. There was about a 117% increase in the number of ballots sent out. There was a **__149%__** increase in the number of ballots that were “unknown” and could have ended up in the wrong mailbox or the trash.

Folks, it doesn’t take a genius to do the math. It takes a pen and paper.

**_And when we are talking fraud, we are talking about only needing a small number of fraudulent votes for the Democrats to be CRIMINALS. Heck, even one would do the job._**

And the Democrats are pushing to increase the number of mail in ballots and voter fraud even further.

**In fact, the President of the Public Interest Legal Foundation issued the following statement:**

_“These figures detail how the 2020 push to mail voting needs to be a one-year experiment. Bills like H.R.1/S.1 risk inflating these numbers even further, pushing our election system toward error, disenfranchisement and ultimately widespread doubt about election outcomes. Some of the counties with the least experience in administering mail voting rejected the most ballots nationwide. If continued, 2020-style chaos will become the norm.”_

Think about that.

**If we let the Democrats continue down this path, and we let them bully us, and we let them call us conspiracy theorists and nutjobs, then they have already won. _“2020-style chaos will become the norm.”_**

I don’t know about you, but I got the pen in my hand and I did the math. It’s up for the Democrats to prove millions of Americans wrong, and that there was NO fraud in the 2020 election!
---
| ***Join the #ProveIt movement***

clean_body: That's how many mail ballots unaccounted for | | | | | Dear , Word just in – about 15 million mail in ballots were unaccounted for in the 2020 Presidential election. This is unacceptable. And I’m here to stand up for election integrity in one of the key swing states in which FRAUD ousted our rightful President. My name is Mark Finchem. I am a State Representative in Arizona and am the vanguard leading the charge in the fight for election integrity in Arizona, in the greatest grassroots movement of the millennium! And now I am running for Secretary of State in Arizona. I paid for important hearings out of pocket when no one else would pay for them. I listened when others covered their ears and I spoke up when others stayed silent. | | If you are done with the propaganda from those who stole the election – it’s time to stand up and speak out. “Safest and most secure?” That is absurd. In fact, the Public Interest Legal Foundation delivered a research brief highlighting a few key findings regarding the 2020 election. In particular: In 2020, there were 90.6 million ballots sent Of these 90.6 million ballots, 1.1 million were undeliverable 560,814 were rejected 14.7 million were “unknown.” These numbers don’t mean anything without additional clarity, so let me quote the brief directly on its definition of “unknown” The U.S. Election Assistance Commission asks local officials how many ballots were not returned as voted, were undeliverable, or were otherwise “unable to be tracked.” The USPS Inspector General most recently reported that only 13 percent of mail ballots in the 2018 General Election used the official tracking system. This means there is a wide variety of things that can happen to a ballot in the “unknown” column. A ballot can be put in the wrong mailbox and land in an unfriendly neighbor’s trash. It can be thrown out with your unpaid bills. It can be left outside for the wind to carry the last mile (like seen in Nevada in 2020). Election officials simply do not know what happened. Unknown ballots are the greatest blind spot in the American electoral system. It should be noted that there were only 5.9 million ballots that were “unknown” in 2016, in which President Trump rightfully won. Let’s do some math. There was about a 117% increase in the number of ballots sent out. There was a 149% increase in the number of ballots that were “unknown” and could have ended up in the wrong mailbox or the trash. Folks, it doesn’t take a genius to do the math. It takes a pen and paper. And when we are talking fraud, we are talking about only needing a small number of fraudulent votes for the Democrats to be CRIMINALS. Heck, even one would do the job. And the Democrats are pushing to increase the number of mail in ballots and voter fraud even further. In fact, the President of the Public Interest Legal Foundation issued the following statement: “These figures detail how the 2020 push to mail voting needs to be a one-year experiment. Bills like H.R.1/S.1 risk inflating these numbers even further, pushing our election system toward error, disenfranchisement and ultimately widespread doubt about election outcomes. Some of the counties with the least experience in administering mail voting rejected the most ballots nationwide. If continued, 2020-style chaos will become the norm.” Think about that. If we let the Democrats continue down this path, and we let them bully us, and we let them call us conspiracy theorists and nutjobs, then they have already won. “2020-style chaos will become the norm.” I don’t know about you, but I got the pen in my hand and I did the math. It’s up for the Democrats to prove millions of Americans wrong, and that there was NO fraud in the 2020 election! | *Join the #ProveIt movement My name is Mark Finchem. I am a proud patriot, conservative, and supporter of Donald Trump. I have fought for election integrity from day one. And every day we see that the brand of election integrity grows stronger and the Fake News Media gets more scared. Kirsten has an important announcement regarding the race for AZ-02. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35170234/304252045/-2037180865?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjBlZTQyMi1lOTBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NKOveg5s7jaTPQKABf6rOazDYugbsFJwEiVyOk_WbX4=&emci=65bfa6aa-e10c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=4b0ee422-e90c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=12898431)

Friend,

Yesterday, my primary opponent, Dr. Randy Friese announced that he was leaving the race to focus on his career as an emergency room surgeon. **I’ve always known Randy to be a dedicated public servant and colleague at the State Legislature.** I’m sure this was a difficult decision to make, but I know he will continue to serve his community well in his capacity as a physician, and I wish him the best with his future endeavors.

**Today, I’m reaching out to Democrats across Southern Arizona and asking them to join our campaign.** Randy and I shared many of the same goals, including enacting commonsense gun safety reforms, addressing climate change, protecting Medicare and Social Security, and standing up for working families across our region.

Many pundits are forecasting a Republican takeover of Congress in 2022. Democratic turnout tends to be lower in midterm elections and losing control of Congress is a very real possibility. Think back to the GOP waves of 2010 & 2012 -- not great years for Democrats. Republicans are targeting a handful of districts- and ours is at the very top of that list. In fact, Governor Ducey’s right-hand man has been chosen by the GOP establishment to flip this seat. **Wealthy corporations and special interest groups are going to spend millions to help him buy this seat back for the Republicans.**

**Now is the time we must unify as Democrats and prepare for what will be a very difficult, but very winnable race. I’m asking you to join our campaign today with a contribution of any amount.[Whether you can give $5, $50, $500, or some other amount, every dollar helps us keep this seat, and possibly Congress itself, in Democratic hands.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35170237/304252050/41694283?refcode=X_090321_BreakingNews&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjBlZTQyMi1lOTBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NKOveg5s7jaTPQKABf6rOazDYugbsFJwEiVyOk_WbX4=)**

If you’re not yet ready to join us, I look forward to earning your support in the weeks to come.

Onward,
Kirsten

This President is asleep at the wheel. It is costing American lives and threatening our national security.

name: Indiana Democratic Party
subject: Fast Facts Friday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party
body:
| | | |
---|---
| | **\- September 03****, 2021-** ******\- Holcomb COVID -** Governor Eric Holcomb has not held a press briefing about Indiana's fight against COVID-19 for more than 157 days -- leaving Hoosiers in the dark as cases, hospitalizations, and deaths are up across Indiana. Holcomb said this week that he was "trying to do everything" to find the "answer to the problem", but the facts don't back up the claims. Truth is, Governor Holcomb has not proactively promoted vaccines online or in public since April and instead, has been more focused on photo-ops that do nothing to help Hoosier families put the COVID-19 pandemic behind them. As the contagious Delta variant gets a tighter grip on the state, Hoosiers are seeking leadership from Holcomb and want to know what it'll take to end COVID for good. But right now, Hoosiers are hearing what amounts to silence. Hoosiers' health and well-being across the state is hanging in the balance and Holcomb and Indiana Republicans' partisanship is getting in the way. **\- Indiana Lawmakers Interested in a Texas Abortion Bill -** This week, the U.S. Supreme Court allowed a dangerous anti-abortion bill in Texas to become law, and with their decision, the fate of _Roe v. Wade_ and a fifty-year precedent of guaranteeing women's reproductive health access is in jeopardy. The Indiana Republican Party's supermajority at the statehouse wasted no time saying they are watching the political fallout from the Texas law very "closely". Their partisan posturing foreshadows the inevitable: Indiana Republicans want to pass this form of dangerous legislation in Indiana as well. Let's be clear: Hoosiers have constitutional rights when it comes to all matters of reproductive health. Further, a majority of Hoosiers oppose dangerous restrictions like a Texas-like anti-abortion bill - just like they did when Mike Pence forced a similar anti-abortion bill in 2016 when [56-percent of Hoosiers](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35171808/304257158/1778784520?FFF.09.03.21=FFF.09.03.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTkxZWVkYi1lZTBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3ixgQkMbRja6yfWJKICe2huG38uXdDregh_Umgr7B_g=&emci=8039c903-190c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=4e91eedb-ee0c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=4925535) (including 61-percent of women) opposed the measure. Truth is, the Indiana Republican Party's partisanship on this issue is extreme and hypocritical. This is the same Republican Party that calls for "personal freedom" on mask mandates and COVID-19 vaccines but has no problem dictating what Hoosier women do with their personal health care. The INGOP continues to show they have lost their identity and prefer to govern by a form of extreme partisanship that does nothing but divide our state and harm Indiana's future. **\- Join Us at LaborFest Tomorrow -** ******\- Opportunities -** **\- County Party Trainings -** **** Join Indiana Democratic Party for a presentation on campaign finance for county party chairs and treasurers.
Please email Lauren Ganapini at [lauren@indems.org](mailto:lauren@indems.org?subject=Campaign%20Finance%20Training%20Sign-Up) for sign-up information. **_This event is only for county party chairs and treasurers._** **__** Join Indiana Democratic Party for a training on what party chairs should know about reprecincting and local office redistricting. Please let us know if you need special accommodations by Thursday 9/16/21.
Please email Lauren Ganapini at [lauren@indems.org](mailto:lauren@indems.org?subject=Reprecincting%20Training%20Sign-Up) for sign-up information. **_This event is only for county party chairs and treasurers._** _**-Save the date-**_ **Bartholomew County Democratic Party:** [BC Democratic Women at the Columbus Farmer's clean_body: | | | | ---|--- | | \- September 03, 2021- ****\- Holcomb COVID - Governor Eric Holcomb has not held a press briefing about Indiana's fight against COVID-19 for more than 157 days -- leaving Hoosiers in the dark as cases, hospitalizations, and deaths are up across Indiana. Holcomb said this week that he was "trying to do everything" to find the "answer to the problem", but the facts don't back up the claims. Truth is, Governor Holcomb has not proactively promoted vaccines online or in public since April and instead, has been more focused on photo-ops that do nothing to help Hoosier families put the COVID-19 pandemic behind them. As the contagious Delta variant gets a tighter grip on the state, Hoosiers are seeking leadership from Holcomb and want to know what it'll take to end COVID for good. But right now, Hoosiers are hearing what amounts to silence. Hoosiers' health and well-being across the state is hanging in the balance and Holcomb and Indiana Republicans' partisanship is getting in the way. \- Indiana Lawmakers Interested in a Texas Abortion Bill - This week, the U.S. Supreme Court allowed a dangerous anti-abortion bill in Texas to become law, and with their decision, the fate of Roe v. Wade and a fifty-year precedent of guaranteeing women's reproductive health access is in jeopardy. The Indiana Republican Party's supermajority at the statehouse wasted no time saying they are watching the political fallout from the Texas law very "closely". Their partisan posturing foreshadows the inevitable: Indiana Republicans want to pass this form of dangerous legislation in Indiana as well. Let's be clear: Hoosiers have constitutional rights when it comes to all matters of reproductive health. Further, a majority of Hoosiers oppose dangerous restrictions like a Texas-like anti-abortion bill - just like they did when Mike Pence forced a similar anti-abortion bill in 2016 when (including 61-percent of women) opposed the measure. Truth is, the Indiana Republican Party's partisanship on this issue is extreme and hypocritical. This is the same Republican Party that calls for "personal freedom" on mask mandates and COVID-19 vaccines but has no problem dictating what Hoosier women do with their personal health care. The INGOP continues to show they have lost their identity and prefer to govern by a form of extreme partisanship that does nothing but divide our state and harm Indiana's future. \- Join Us at LaborFest Tomorrow - ****\- Opportunities - \- County Party Trainings - ** Join Indiana Democratic Party for a presentation on campaign finance for county party chairs and treasurers. Please email Lauren Ganapini at mailto:lauren@indems.org?subject=Campaign%20Finance%20Training%20Sign-Up for sign-up information. This event is only for county party chairs and treasurers. Join Indiana Democratic Party for a training on what party chairs should know about reprecincting and local office redistricting. Please let us know if you need special accommodations by Thursday 9/16/21. Please email Lauren Ganapini at mailto:lauren@indems.org?subject=Reprecincting%20Training%20Sign-Up for sign-up information. This week, the Supreme Court took a decisive step in eliminating a woman’s right to choose by allowing a near-total ban on abortions to be implemented in Texas — effectively nullfying _Roe v. Wade_.
The Texas law bans all abortions at six weeks of pregnancy — _before most women know they are even pregnant._ And it does it by turning neighbors on each other: awarding bounties of at least $10,000 to people who successfully sue women who seek abortions after six weeks or those who helped them.
**Make no mistake, this is a brazen, unconstitutional decision that puts the lives of so many people in danger.** And it’s why I have demanded that Congress guarantee reproductive rights for all by enshrining _Roe v. Wade_ into law.
This is all the more reason why we need to act urgently to protect our Democratic, pro-choice majority in the Senate. Right now, Republican-controlled state legislatures across the country are looking to further undermine _Roe_ by passing unconstitutional, anti-choice laws of their own. There are over 500 anti-choice bills sitting in state legislatures right now.
We can’t afford to lose our slim Democratic majority in the Senate — without it, we can’t confirm federal judges that will uphold _Roe_ and protect reproductive rights.
**That’s why we’re counting on the support of people like you to help us hold our Democratic majority and safeguard reproductive rights. So folks, will you pitch in what you can to help us keep our pro-choice majority in the Senate? Any amount helps.**

clean_body: Folks — together we raised nearly $2,000 for Texas abortion funds from yesterday’s email. Your response is proof that this fight isn’t over. Not even close. Now I’m reaching out with another important ask: Will you chip in a donation of any amount to help me protect our Democratic, pro-choice majority in the Senate? I’ll explain why this is so important in just a moment. If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = This week, the Supreme Court took a decisive step in eliminating a woman’s right to choose by allowing a near-total ban on abortions to be implemented in Texas — effectively nullfying Roe v. Wade. The Texas law bans all abortions at six weeks of pregnancy — before most women know they are even pregnant. And it does it by turning neighbors on each other: awarding bounties of at least $10,000 to people who successfully sue women who seek abortions after six weeks or those who helped them. Make no mistake, this is a brazen, unconstitutional decision that puts the lives of so many people in danger. And it’s why I have demanded that Congress guarantee reproductive rights for all by enshrining Roe v. Wade into law. This is all the more reason why we need to act urgently to protect our Democratic, pro-choice majority in the Senate. Right now, Republican-controlled state legislatures across the country are looking to further undermine Roe by passing unconstitutional, anti-choice laws of their own. There are over 500 anti-choice bills sitting in state legislatures right now. We can’t afford to lose our slim Democratic majority in the Senate — without it, we can’t confirm federal judges that will uphold Roe and protect reproductive rights. That’s why we’re counting on the support of people like you to help us hold our Democratic majority and safeguard reproductive rights. So folks, will you pitch in what you can to help us keep our pro-choice majority in the Senate? Any amount helps. If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks for your help. —Martin | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. name: Ro Khanna
subject: Alex Padilla
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
Will you help Alex defend his Senate seat?
#

Friends, my colleague Alex Padilla is defending one of California’s U.S. Senate seats after being appointed to fill Vice President Kamala Harris’ vacancy. I’m about to tell you more about why it’s so important we help Alex defend this seat — but first, [**will you split a donation of $10 or more between our campaigns to support our ongoing efforts to end the filibuster, pass Medicare for All, and fight climate change by passing a Green New Deal?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-rksplit?refcode=em210903-1-30&t=1&refcode2=279_159979_lDYrYE&akid=279%2E159979%2ElDYrYE)
Alex is the son of Mexican immigrants who worked long hours as a cook and housekeeper to keep their family afloat. He went on to spend his life serving the people — as a community organizer, as Los Angeles City Council President, as a California State Senator, as California’s Secretary of State, and now, as California’s first Latino U.S. Senator.
Alex’s commitment to our shared progressive values is undeniable – he’s a vocal advocate for Medicare for All and a Green New Deal — but his re-election is far from guaranteed. It’s going to take serious grassroots support to help Alex defend his seat and Democrats’ Senate majority in the year ahead.
[**If you can, will you be one of the grassroots donors we need to split a contribution between Alex and I in our fights for reelection? Any amount you can chip in will make a big difference today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-rksplit?refcode=em210903-1-30&t=2&refcode2=279_159979_lDYrYE&akid=279%2E159979%2ElDYrYE)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your split contribution instantly:_

| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-rksplit?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em210903-1-30&t=22&refcode2=279_159979_lDYrYE&akid=279%2E159979%2ElDYrYE)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-rksplit?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em210903-1-30&t=23&refcode2=279_159979_lDYrYE&akid=279%2E159979%2ElDYrYE)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-rksplit?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em210903-1-30&t=24&refcode2=279_159979_lDYrYE&akid=279%2E159979%2ElDYrYE)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-rksplit?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210903-1-30&t=25&refcode2=279_159979_lDYrYE&akid=279%2E159979%2ElDYrYE)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-rksplit?express_lane=true&refcode=em210903-1-30&t=26&refcode2=279_159979_lDYrYE&akid=279%2E159979%2ElDYrYE)**
---
****
We can’t achieve our top progressive priorities without ending the filibuster and maintaining our Congressional majorities in 2022. Keeping Alex in the U.S. Senate is critical to both of those fights, and I’m deeply grateful to everyone who can join me in supporting his campaign.
Thank you for your help,
Ro
**[SPLIT A DONATION](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-rksplit?refcode=em210903-1-30&t=27&refcode2=279_159979_lDYrYE&akid=279%2E159979%2ElDYrYE)**

Donald Trump DEFEATED Hillary Clinton and RESHAPED the Supreme Court by ramming through three nominees in just four years.

**AND THEN:**

With the help of Trump's extreme justices, the Supreme Court just allowed one of the most OPPRESSIVE anti-abortion laws in history to go into effect in Texas. _**NO!!**_

**BUT NOW:**

**Hillary Clinton is refusing to stay silent or give up --_and she 's calling on grassroots Democrats EVERYWHERE to join her in the fight:_**

[](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/34GVF3r-)

Hillary is absolutely right.

We can't give up the fight to protect reproductive rights -- not now, and not ever.

That means we must PROTECT our House Majority and ELECT more pro-choice House Democrats all across the country -- _or else we risk Trump 's anti-choice Republicans overpowering us._

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: Sharing some pictures with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
Peter, I’ve enjoyed traveling across the state a little extra lately, and I have a few pictures to share with you below, but let me briefly start with this:

From Bayfield to Beloit, we’re taking this campaign across Wisconsin -- meeting folks where they’re at to talk about how we can get this U.S. Senate seat working for them again. And at every stop, I’m reminded why this election is so important to the future of Wisconsin.

We need someone who actually understands the problems facing our state and delivers real solutions. But Ron Johnson refuses to lift a finger to help our struggling communities. The people of Wisconsin may not be his priority, but they are mine. That’s why I got in this race, and why I’ve been out on the road so much.

**[I’m about to share some pictures from the trail with you, but first, I’d like to ask you to make a small contribution to help our campaign continue visiting communities across Wisconsin. We’re building a movement strong enough to defeat Ron Johnson and I’m counting on your support. Chip in if you can:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35172359/304259859/-623328154?gpsid=50_130_20365&refcode=em21_210903_Photos_fnd_gq_act__SG_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210903_Photos_fnd_gq_act__SG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGY5MGY1MC1mMTBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sX2vrWg7h2xgzgtaSm9z1aquobnoX1B2gsIl2LTRSrk=)**
| [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35172360/304259860/-623328154?gpsid=50_130_20365&refcode=em21_210903_Photos_fnd_gq_act__SG_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210903_Photos_fnd_gq_act__SG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGY5MGY1MC1mMTBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sX2vrWg7h2xgzgtaSm9z1aquobnoX1B2gsIl2LTRSrk=)
---

Now, as promised, here are a few things I’ve looked back on:
**Grassroots supporters have hosted meet and greets just about everywhere -- Milwaukee, Rice Lake, Green Bay, you name it. I get asked a lot about prescription drug costs, broadband access, childcare options, and so much more -- kitchen table issues that are critical to informing our agenda and making sure we’re fighting for all Wisconsinites.** **I’ve visited small businesses like Littleport Brewing Company and Hot Shop Glass in Racine (huge thanks to Mark and Chris!), Lion’s Mouth Bookstore in Green Bay, Broadway Theater in De Pere, and more. I was also grateful to Venice for showing me around Alice’s Garden Urban Farm in Milwaukee -- a community garden where they focus on urban agriculture, regenerative farming, and community cultural development.** **In Waukesha County, I met a few folks at a local coffee shop to talk about the need for quality, affordable childcare, protecting and expanding our health care, and other issues important to the community. I also met with working moms to discuss paid leave and making the child tax credit permanent. And in Dane County, I got a chance to meet with seniors to talk about how we can bring down prescription drug costs, expand Medicare, and strengthen Social Security.** **I was honored to receive former Congressman Steven Kagen’s endorsement. He won a competitive primary and flipped WI-08, which Republicans had held for nearly a decade -- he knows how to win a tough fight! I’m proud to stand with him along with a number of incredible state and local officials, community leaders, and countless other Wisconsinites who have endorsed this campaign. I got a chance to join him in Brown County along with a few other folks in the area for a meet and greet.** **Finally, we got to visit the Wisconsin State Fair along with several county fairs, picnics, and festivals -- like the Hmong Festival in Wausau, where I joined my friend Lada Xiong to speak with folks about how we can all work together to strengthen our state’s Hmong communities. We ate cream puffs, drank lemonade, ate a whole lot of cheese, and had great conversations with folks from all over.**
When we win by only a few votes per precinct, every little bit counts. We need someone who will put working families first by fighting to protect our health care, lower the cost of prescription drugs, create good-paying jobs, and more. Someone who’s willing to put in a little western Wisconsin elbow grease to get the job done.

I’m running for U.S. Senate to be the leader you deserve, especially during challenging times like this -- and folks in Wisconsin deserve nothing less than someone who will show up in their communities, listen to what they have to say, be their voice at the decision-making table, and deliver results. That’s what I have done as State Treasurer, and it’s what I intend to do as Wisconsin’s next U.S. Senator.

**[Can I count on you to stand with me? We have a really good shot at flipping this seat blue, but only if enough folks like you join the team. I hope you’ll help us take back Wisconsin and expand the Senate majority by chipping in any amount meaningful to you today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35172361/304259861/-623328154?gpsid=50_130_20365&refcode=em21_210903_Photos_fnd_gq_act__SG_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210903_Photos_fnd_gq_act__SG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGY5MGY1MC1mMTBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sX2vrWg7h2xgzgtaSm9z1aquobnoX1B2gsIl2LTRSrk=)**

From Green Bay to Eau Claire, Superior to Kenosha, we’ll get this Senate seat working for Wisconsin again, but it’ll require all of us to get the job done. It’s been great to meet so many folks across the state, and I’m excited to hopefully meet you in your neck of the woods very soon.

Thank you to everyone who’s taken the time to join us on the road. Stay safe, be well, and take care of yourself.

— Sarah Godlewski
[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35172363/304259863/-623328154?gpsid=50_130_20365&refcode=em21_210903_Photos_fnd_gq_act__SG_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210903_Photos_fnd_gq_act__SG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGY5MGY1MC1mMTBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sX2vrWg7h2xgzgtaSm9z1aquobnoX1B2gsIl2LTRSrk=)
---

Madison, WI 53701

If you are a registered lobbyist and have received this email in error, please **[contact us here.](mailto:info@sarahforwisconsin.com)** And if you'd like to support Sarah's campaign for U.S. Senate in Wisconsin, please **[add a donation](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35172369/304259869/-236948790?refcode=em2021&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGY5MGY1MC1mMTBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sX2vrWg7h2xgzgtaSm9z1aquobnoX1B2gsIl2LTRSrk=)** to help us win.

name: Keystone Progress Education Fund
subject: Meet voter rights activist Desmond Meade with 1Hood Power this Sunday.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=090221dm [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=090221dm]

Dear Friend,

We are excited to announce that Keystone Progress partner 1Hood Power [https://www.facebook.com/1HoodPower/] is hosting a meet-and-greet this Sunday featuring esteemed voting rights and criminal justice advocate, Desmond Meade [https://floridarrc.com/desmond-meade/] .

Keystone Progress is working closely with 1Hood Power in Western Pennsylvania leading up to the General Election.

About Desmond Meade

Recognized by Time Magazine as one of 2019's 100 Most Influential People in the World, Mr. Meade is a formerly homeless returning citizen who is president and executive director of the Florida Rights Restoration Coalition (FRRC), chair of Floridians for a Fair Democracy, and a graduate of Florida International University College of Law. He leads efforts to empower and civically re-engage local communities, and to reshape local, state, and national criminal justice policies. Mr. Meade led the FRRC to a historic victory in 2018 with the successful passage of Amendment 4, a grassroots citizen’s initiative which restored voting rights to over 1.4 million Floridians with past felony convictions.
https://www.facebook.com/events/1877287009130148/ [https://www.facebook.com/events/1877287009130148/]

About the Event
This informal meet-and-greet welcomes candidates, organizers, and the public to interact in an intimate, laid back atmosphere with Mr. Meade as we prepare for the election season.

- Sunday, September 5, 2021 from noon - 4:00 pm
- NOTE: The event will be outside due to growing covid concerns.
- Entry Garden at Pittsburgh's Highland Park (Entrance at North Highland Ave. and Bunkerhill St.)
- The event will feature a DJ, free food, and voter information tables for the public.
- Candidates are encouraged to RSVP at khari@1hood.org or miracle@1hood.org.

Learn more here. [https://www.facebook.com/events/1877287009130148/]

See you there!

Keystone Progress Education Fund

https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/ [https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/]

Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www.kpef.info. Not affiliated with any candidate or candidate's committees.

Keystone Progress Education Fund
PO Box 1206
Harrisburg, PA 17108
United States

name: Marco Rubio
subject: I'm begging
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
Peter, I can’t believe this.
|
---

name: Meredith Shevitz
subject: Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
Friends, this has been a difficult week. I’ve watched in horror and anger as Texas enacted the most restrictive abortion ban in the country, banning abortions after six weeks. This law is dangerous. It denies women the basic right to make their own decisions about their bodies and their health care. And it sets the stage for reproductive rights to be further chipped away in states across the country -- including in New Hampshire, where Republicans enacted an abortion ban earlier this year. This attack on our constitutional rights is deeply scary. But the work is far from over. Now more than ever, we must fight for reproductive freedom and elect pro-choice leaders at all levels of government. Senator Hassan has been an unwavering champion for reproductive rights in the Senate, cosponsoring key legislation to protect the right to an abortion and leading efforts to increase funding for family planning programs. **At a time when _Roe v. Wade_ is under attack like never before, we can’t lose Maggie’s voice in the Senate.** Maggie Hassan will never stop fighting for our rights -- and I’m going to do whatever it takes to stop anti-choice Republicans from taking back this seat. **[If you’re with us, please chip in $5 or whatever you can.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35175934/304272700/-149339129?refcode=e20210903_mw-tx&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMWNkMTJiMy1mYjBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rU4hpo7CeFNsUZX2befbE8BitkjMFrNnL2KL8afzzBo=)** Thank you for your support. Meredith Shevitz

name: Team Kilmer
subject: Protect the USPS »
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
It's official, Peter -- the United States Postal Service is deliberately slowing down mail delivery times in October. And _The Washington Post_ reported that Washington will be one of the most heavily impacted states in the country.

This isn't the first time Postmaster General Louis DeJoy's actions have jeopardized the USPS -- and it's not the first time Derek is taking action to respond. Just last year, Derek co-sponsored the Delivering for America Act to STOP DeJoy from implementing these changes. At that time, efforts to sabotage the Postal Service jeopardized the ability to vote by mail.

Countless Americans rely on the USPS to deliver life-saving medication, emergency supplies, Social Security checks, mail-in ballots, and more through rain, shine, and even global pandemics. Derek understands how essential the USPS is to our way of life.

**[We can't let DeJoy's attacks go unanswered, Peter. We have to protect the USPS for seniors, veterans, rural communities, and our democracy. Will you sign our petition to call for the replacement of Postmaster General DeJoy immediately?](https://act.myngp.com/el/nzPMnLroSQNIOScIp1vrC6XJh4EzF5DFHaHrj0Yg0tg=/-ni5c18YF8IxJxMWFs4-RRMEpfucY244ubAnBfwIV10=?gpsid=50_115_20331&ms=em21_210903_USPS_engg_gq_act__TK_ettx&refcode=em21_210903_USPS_engg_gq_act__TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210903_USPS_engg_gq_act__TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)**

clean_body: It's official, Peter -- the United States Postal Service is deliberately slowing down mail delivery times in October. And The Washington Post reported that Washington will be one of the most heavily impacted states in the country. This isn't the first time Postmaster General Louis DeJoy's actions have jeopardized the USPS -- and it's not the first time Derek is taking action to respond. Just last year, Derek co-sponsored the Delivering for America Act to STOP DeJoy from implementing these changes. At that time, efforts to sabotage the Postal Service jeopardized the ability to vote by mail. Countless Americans rely on the USPS to deliver life-saving medication, emergency supplies, Social Security checks, mail-in ballots, and more through rain, shine, and even global pandemics. Derek understands how essential the USPS is to our way of life. Thank you, Team Kilmer Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign. = | = ---|--- Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer People for Derek Kilmer PO Box 1381 Tacoma WA 98402 United States Peter, thank you so much for being a supporter of Derek Kilmer and Democrats up and down the ballot. Our digital program helps us reach folks with the latest updates. But, if you'd rather not hear from our team, please =.

name: John Fetterman
subject: re: Manchin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Now is not the time to "hit the pause button." Now is the time to take action and rebuild. Period.
#
Peter, this is infuriating.
Senator Joe Manchin has now suggested that Democrats in the Senate "hit the pause button" on President Biden's plan to make a historic and urgently needed investment in our nation's infrastructure.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/29655?refcode=em20210903-2513&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2513%2E434096%2EvD6Oo3)
HOW could a sitting Senator say we need to hit pause on infrastructure on the very same day of severe and deadly floods and destruction across Pennsylvania, the Northeast, and the South. Hurricane Ida has once again laid bare the fact that our current infrastructure is outdated and neglected. And it won't stand a fighting chance against the climate emergency that becomes more dire by the day.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/29655?refcode=em20210903-2513&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2513%2E434096%2EvD6Oo3)
_Extreme flooding in Philadelphia, PA_
_Respectfully — now is not the time to "hit the pause button."_ Now is the time to take action and rebuild. Period.
By now, I've made it pretty clear what I think about Democrats who choose to needlessly stand in the way of the bold progress that working people across the country voted for.
It is my solemn pledge to you that I will not be one of those kinds of Senators. I will *always* act with conviction and vote in favor of progress for the working families of this country.
**Peter, if you want a Democrat that you can depend on, that you know is always going to stand up and fight for you, and is actually going to vote like a Democrat, then I am humbly asking for your support in my campaign.**
[**_Our campaign is the most reliant on the grassroots of ANY in this PA Senate race, so I mean it when I tell you I am relying on your support today. Will you chip in your first $5 or more to support our grassroots campaign to flip this seat blue and add that 51st Democratic vote to the U.S. Senate?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/29655?refcode=em20210903-2513&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2513%2E434096%2EvD6Oo3)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/29655?refcode=em20210903-2513&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2513%2E434096%2EvD6Oo3)**
Democrats need to vote like Democrats. We have the House, we have the Senate, we have the White House – so let's act like it and finally deliver real results for working people.
Thank you for having my back, Peter.
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
P.S. The last thing Pennsylvania needs is a senator has had to "evolve" on issues. We don't need a senator who will ever be praised by Mitch McConnell. And we _definitely don't_ need a senator who will stand in the way of transformative legislation that helps working people. [** _If you're with me, please donate $5 to support our people-powered campaign._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/29655?refcode=em20210903-2513&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=2513%2E434096%2EvD6Oo3)
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails-footer-test?refcode=em20210903-2513-footer-test-ctrl&t=28&refcode2=2513_434096_vD6Oo3&akid=2513%2E434096%2EvD6Oo3)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=29&akid=2513%2E434096%2EvD6Oo3)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=30&akid=2513%2E434096%2EvD6Oo3)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

Your support and advocacy is critical to our scrappy, grassroots movement. We’re honored that you share our vision for a more equitable and inclusive political space that values workplace integrity and ethical labor.

**We mean it when we say that this is a truly people-powered mission, and every single dollar you’ve given has directly helped our dreams come true.** Let’s keep up the momentum because we’re making a difference together. Onward and upward! **_Eden and Megan_** [**P.S. We wanted to reach out real quick before you start your Labor Day weekend. Arizona workers provide the country with so much, and we must make sure they are protected in the workplace with good conditions and livable wages.

Tom has worked to ensure laborers in Arizona and across the nation get the respect and wages they deserve. [_**Can you chip in today to help keep Tom in Congress so he can continue fighting for Arizona workers?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35177467/304277024/-255823205?refcode=em_fr_2021.09.03_b1_toh_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjFmNjNjMC0wMTBkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V3CJke8IgxkqhentobvL7RFxn8KlHX2ha0mkZg9MUOM=)

National Republicans are targeting this seat as a top seat they think they can flip, and we need to prove them wrong. They’ve already invested in attack ads against Tom, and dark money groups are planning on massive spending in this district.

[_**Can you make a contribution before you start your weekend to make sure that we have what it takes to defeat these groups and win? * * *
\---------- Forwarded Message ----------

Hello —

My name is Diego Rodriguez and I'm running to be the next Attorney General for Arizona.

**Right now, Arizona is in crisis**. The State Senate's "audit" has given conspiracy theorists (whose claims have been repeatedly proven false) access to millions of ballots and cost taxpayers millions of dollars. The governor has gone from an anemic COVID response to an outright hostile one. And our current AG is playing to a radicalized right-wing base instead of _fighting for the people_.

I've had **enough**.

It's time to bring _transparency, accountability, and integrity_ back to the AG's office. That's why I'm running to be the People's Attorney.

My story begins in a trailer in Wyoming — my childhood home. Growing up there with my six siblings, **economic hardship and discrimination was a daily reality**. These experiences are why I fought for policies in the State House like a $15 minimum wage and a worker’s right to organize, and I'll keep fighting those fights as AG.

Law school brought me to the great state of Arizona. Though I've stayed a lifelong Democrat, I've worked as a prosecutor, defense attorney, civil attorney, and state legislator since my arrival here. **I know the Arizona criminal justice system inside and out**, which means I'm ready to lead the fight to address its biggest challenges.

But no good fight gets finished alone. That's why I'm reaching out to see if you'll join my team.

[**Will you help me build a better, more just Arizona by becoming a founding donor on my campaign?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35177575/304277308/2127152568?refcode=X_090321_DRIntroFwd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDUxNTEwMC0wMjBkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a7VdVQnGGJZV4ix1aecGJq-NTxxG3ezkQ975HX9oO-s=)

Here's to the good fight!

\-- _Diego_

| **Rep. Diego Rodriguez is running for Attorney General to be the People's Attorney, focused on our needs instead of partisan stunts. As a lifelong Democrat, a prosecutor, a defense attorney, and now as a State Representative, Diego is the most experienced and most qualified candidate that we can trust to fight for our rights.**

[**Will you join Team Diego by chipping in a few dollars now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35177577/304277310/2127152568?refcode=X_090321_DRIntroFwd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDUxNTEwMC0wMjBkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a7VdVQnGGJZV4ix1aecGJq-NTxxG3ezkQ975HX9oO-s=)

name: Larry Elder Recall Newsom
subject: It’s not too late for CA
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LARRY ELDER BALLOT MEASURE COMMITTEE RECALL NEWSOM
body:
To say Gavin Newsom has failed California is a HUGE understatement. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c314%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=O6fDAN%2fssH9NZzZmhA6jLA&sysid=1)
We can’t begin to save California without FIRST voting YES to recall Newsom. | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65317%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pdRH%2fM73T6eA04%2fvMg1r2w&sysid=1)

---
Friend,

To say Gavin Newsom has failed California is a HUGE understatement.

Gavin Newsom has...
Destroyed...
Betrayed...
Ruined...
Endangered...
Repressed...
Impoverished California.

This is why we're fighting to recall Gavin Newsom, [**and we need your help.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65318%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wKOqrAsQ29CiMJ9OVg7Bzw&sysid=1)

We can’t begin to save California and restore it to the place where people once again come to achieve the American Dream without **FIRST voting YES to recall Newsom.**

[**Will you join us and help recall Gavin Newsom on September 14th by chipping in $25, $50, $100 or even more today?**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65319%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bLB1s6joSiXRQtnc3ERmOw&sysid=1)

[**JOIN LARRY ELDER'S COMMITTEE
TO RECALL GAVIN NEWSOM → **](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65310%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=y2LPBwevTBs9yjIrr6eGuQ&sysid=1)
Under Gavin Newsom, people and businesses are fleeing California in droves. Those who choose to stay face rampant crime & homelessness, a broken education system, high cost of living and high taxes.

_What has happened to California is both heartbreaking and infuriating_

**It’s not too late to save our state, but first we need to get rid of the man responsible for its demise.**

Recalling Gavin Newsom is question #1 on the September 14th recall election ballot, and it’s the first step to getting California back on the path to prosperity, opportunity and exceptionalism.

[**Will you contribute $25, $50, $100 or even more now to help us rally Californians who are ready to save California and recall failed governor Gavin Newsom?**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65311%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6hNVlC6dddcJz0d1M%2bs2lg&sysid=1)

Thank you,

Lou Barnett
Campaign Manager
Larry Elder Recall Newsom Ballot Committee

[**JOIN LARRY ELDER'S COMMITTEE
TO RECALL GAVIN NEWSOM → **](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65310%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=y2LPBwevTBs9yjIrr6eGuQ&sysid=1)

---

| PAID FOR BY LARRY ELDER BALLOT MEASURE COMMITTEE RECALL NEWSOM
Committee major funding from:
Elder for Governor 2021
Geoff Palmer
Saul Fox
