Peter,

Like so many Americans, I am watching the scenes coming out of Afghanistan with disbelief, extreme sadness and even anger. You see, I served the greatest country on Earth in Afghanistan back in 2015. But Afghanistan wasn't the only place I looked terrorism directly in the eyes...

**August 21 st marked six years since the fateful late-summer afternoon that changed my life and those of my two best friends - forever.**

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=192156405dfc4abca622b6b9f13a9c80&_e=BdiiIWHRl810OP_QDE7kZ1PvO0KJnJO50SoJ_6qjtEVWa1kWEmJk9S6cmHCMAlZtd85ykIQsV1aUzOR5pqLiVVCD1WuxAcb4fVHk9Jdv_nKtSVzOU4WPnkTqEjxjWJYrc2qe0PeCQpuCnmXkhd24pwB_viEJuwLyTi5TJhY27T-YuozUozd4hwffT_nY-U5oinMKGmp2nsRMQ_iIJHEko7IJ-iETMA3pxDDMML1lFwiVJUAZq0IEbiTKmEe1EUEgmHcWUAfwe2Wy3WWzTrwUEb0kAKoxeDwAJjUSuwB5FqBcD_yWe9PWO57TdJHLT83SMz4MRWp7y6U4qAPHJr-D67GHLGylxG0l3ozLKcDpzELKzd-W45Phnx3zt1rNbh_1o73X0qSaoj0TBq4uD4zCaqofR1zyuCwpOfsB2tyKPc2Rs-bCmuZKQzrejot6dsaoJBc7IowH29tfs4G3b_99BGOLZiBRxFjbLmI3wWIjKak%3D)
I had just finished serving our great nation in Afghanistan when my best friends and I decided to take a vacation in Europe. We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when a terrorist emerged from the bathroom, bare-chested and armed with an assault rifle, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take over and kill us all.

As a soldier, I was trained to take out a terrorist threat -As an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I was in the world. **Which is why I, my friends and other brave travelers took the action needed to stop this terrorist.**

This split-second decision prevented what witnesses contend could have become a mass slaughter. There is a reason I was able to make this split-second decision to intervene, Peter - **I have and always will be willing to give my life in the fight for freedom, in the image of true American values.**

[**At the end of this email, I am going to ask you to donate $6 to my campaign for Congress, in honor of the sixth anniversary of the Thalys train attack. But first, you need to understand why we need an American fighter like myself in Washington.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=192156405dfc4abca622b6b9f13a9c80&_e=BdiiIWHRl810OP_QDE7kZ1PvO0KJnJO50SoJ_6qjtEVWa1kWEmJk9S6cmHCMAlZtd85ykIQsV1aUzOR5pqLiVVCD1WuxAcb4fVHk9Jdv_nKtSVzOU4WPnkTqEjxjWJYrc2qe0PeCQpuCnmXkhd24pwB_viEJuwLyTi5TJhY27T-YuozUozd4hwffT_nY-U5oinMKGmp2nsRMQ_iIJHEko7IJ-iETMA3pxDDMML1lFwiVJUAZq0IEbiTKmEe1EUEgspqeTrPTQtjYqm4wCUdx2aqVD6z1nJjBnzpKn12I3t4TBqzhtBPAtIoo5SCIcTnH2NWLwNmbsp6nzDp63DrJ-9A24DZsv0pCnHJxsbM3V3WWLQI35FvhRz9_ALJMil-F1E9UB7Ta2NSXMxVZFZ2IsFo2cyx2_X-NdjSOk6YyOR8z-MMo6zEhW4zMf1o59HexjZ0c6py3RzK5nGQjxwvsul8NzCIPE06VAoD3pPaAk20%3D)

Now, our homeland is in danger. Not from radical Islamic terrorists, but radical Democrats who want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. Leftist legislation is assaulting our Nation, our communities, and the American Dream.

Right now, Democrats are...
* Opening and destroying our borders. They are g**ranting dangerous amnesty** that will flood every corner of America.
* **Raising our taxes** like we have never seen, and making common goods like gas and groceries unaffordable.
* **Defunding the police,** leading to a surge in violent crime
* **Erasing historical figures** from our schools like George Washington and Abraham Lincoln
* Teetering on the edge of a **dangerous foreign policy crisis**

These power-hungry Democrat elitists like Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden don’t care about the people they represent. **They only care about their own radical agenda, and my opponent, Peter DeFazio is one of the primary offenders.**

The Biden Democrats' grip on power in Washington is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security. The only way to pull America out of this leftist tailspin is by taking back the House in 2022. **We need a fighter in Congress, Peter and I hope that hearing my story proves to you that I am the man for the job.**

My life’s mission has always been to represent the America I know and love - the world’s bastion of freedom and economic prosperity. [**I am taking that mission and putting it into action by running for Congress, by fighting for my neighbors and their wellbeing in Washington.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=192156405dfc4abca622b6b9f13a9c80&_e=BdiiIWHRl810OP_QDE7kZ1PvO0KJnJO50SoJ_6qjtEVWa1kWEmJk9S6cmHCMAlZtd85ykIQsV1aUzOR5pqLiVVCD1WuxAcb4fVHk9Jdv_nKtSVzOU4WPnkTqEjxjWJYrc2qe0PeCQpuCnmXkhd24pwB_viEJuwLyTi5TJhY27T-YuozUozd4hwffT_nY-U5oinMKGmp2nsRMQ_iIJHEko7IJ-iETMA3pxDDMML1lFwiVJUAZq0IEbiTKmEe1EUEgTzYYnuSMJs_OUz2lvav6IMeXgxcpYIxyuXqtzzHLEqm5x-SPEleTPIpEec47GzmP-bL5Qg71gJTp04z5ES08RCCo_d49MAjeByOnsWgN2cjhpZmurmk4u9naORmvzt1AxSgx01sj1GJNsroPIGGgKQ__YgluH6-VojC6RhmDlLHJu3EA0WiuSF1qvPXXX3z99oeNGvR-JNT9sKFRm7O5yCIkE0pkvuosBYtK1I4U2s0%3D)

This will not be an easy road, which is why I am reaching out to you. I will need the financial support of every American patriot; every single dollar will help. [**Can I count on you to join my team with a donation of $6 - to mark my sixth anniversary of thwarting a terrorist attack?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=192156405dfc4abca622b6b9f13a9c80&_e=BdiiIWHRl810OP_QDE7kZ1PvO0KJnJO50SoJ_6qjtEVWa1kWEmJk9S6cmHCMAlZtd85ykIQsV1aUzOR5pqLiVVCD1WuxAcb4fVHk9Jdv_nKtSVzOU4WPnkTqEjxjWJYrc2qe0PeCQpuCnmXkhd24pwB_viEJuwLyTi5TJhY27T-YuozUozd4hwffT_nY-U5oinMKGmp2nsRMQ_iIJHEko7IJ-iETMA3pxDDMML1lFwiVJUAZq0IEbiTKmEe1EUEg1Vc3meObm7CynHPTs-twUpeAb019KWRBiYBcQJLGRsvTmw2T2lEKUELk2Wj0Xu85VmU0HqREpVjIRU95PimDfGcXs8I14DOoBX3yz6DX3BR9p7csdU_LEXvNHMJuF-fuXDGkv-jFD2Oy4IrzzL--JHpy4uDe9cpnxxUYu8KL_TDRVXKvInOciC-Y1vEmu7PdskmxAw-13N9ov-TLLMxz_C8rUSF9qsI6LOOmTYEBSS0%3D)

[**DONATE $6 TODAY -> **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=192156405dfc4abca622b6b9f13a9c80&_e=BdiiIWHRl810OP_QDE7kZ1PvO0KJnJO50SoJ_6qjtEVWa1kWEmJk9S6cmHCMAlZtd85ykIQsV1aUzOR5pqLiVVCD1WuxAcb4fVHk9Jdv_nKtSVzOU4WPnkTqEjxjWJYrc2qe0PeCQpuCnmXkhd24pwB_viEJuwLyTi5TJhY27T-YuozUozd4hwffT_nY-U5oinMKGmp2nsRMQ_iIJHEko7IJ-iETMA3pxDDMML1lFwiVJUAZq0IEbiTKmEe1EUEgBXhvwNCmCbCfo-Pp7gwyuyEKO_GR0FLz2KWAPxl6S4QvaDoGeOFpbk24mdMdRwYI9CgwKdA0rCIMyx3BC1eiRYejeggi2rHRN89mxOQ3_OeZryAGEcvxA2RPTTKBKs5-GzTPETEEpSm9gN6wIYymdG3gLwH2BImS7BdOHJQWNbXu8isml5IH-9WFAN7bCgLyRX8vKXRH5i5H1mZTeH7xjuiXDHJCDhVmWThQyOvTSDM%3D)

Alek Skarlatos
Republican for Congress

Fellow Conservative,

I wanted to briefly reach out today to say thank you for your generosity in August.

Up until a few months ago, you’d never heard my name – and it’s likely we haven’t met in person, but I am humbled that you’ve made an investment in my campaign.

As a first-time political candidate, I’m still learning the ins and outs of running for Congress. It’s not an easy task – but it’s worth the time because our country is going down a path of no return and we’re running out of time to course correct.

I promise you that your investment in me won’t be wasted. Virginia’s 7th congressional district will be one of the most hotly contested races in the entire country next year, and It’s probably that the House majority will be decided by the victor in this race.

With sincere thanks,

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: The worst anti-women’s health care law in the country
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE, POWEREDXPEOPLE
body:
A tough week for Texas.

The anti-voter elections bill we’d fought this entire year passed the
Texas legislature on Tuesday, and the following day a raft of truly
terrible new laws went into effect.

For example, anyone can now carry a gun in public without getting a
permit, or going through a background check or receiving any kind of
training. This, in a state that has four of the worst mass shootings in
U.S. history and a crisis in gun violence against women (women in Texas
are 24% more likely to be murdered with a gun than women in other states).

And now in a state that leads the country and much of the developed world
in the rate of maternal mortality — because it was already so hard for
women to get healthcare, family planning help or to see a doctor of any
kind at all — nearly no one will be able to get a safe, legal abortion.
Our state has created a system of legalized harassment with the passage of
the worst anti-women’s health care law in the country, one that literally
places a $10,000 bounty on anyone who supports a woman trying to exercise
her basic right to control her own health and decide her own future.

That’s just some of what the people of Texas are up against thanks to our
state’s radical, out of control Republican government. They’re also hard
at work making scapegoats of public educators, transgender kids and
immigrants — all while making Texas one of the deadliest states when it
comes to Covid transmission, and keeping their donors in the energy
industry happy at the expense of the lives of our fellow Texans.

The only way to change these laws and the terrible trajectory we’re on is
to change the people in power.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/46921?refcode=ema20210903-152238&t=1001&akid=152238%2E444211%2E6c5joG ]That’s why I’m asking you to join me by making a donation of
$3 or more to support our efforts to reach, register, and
turn out the voters who can help us stop this slide toward cruelty,
corruption and authoritarianism and win back Texas in 2022.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/46921?refcode=ema20210903-152238&amount=3&t=1020&akid=152238%2E444211%2E6c5joG ]Contribute $3

Please chip in whatever you can afford to help us ramp up our efforts to
register new voters, improve access to the ballot box, and ensure that the
communities targeted for intimidation and suppression can participate in
our democracy and have a say in our future.

If we stay focused on registering and connecting with voters — especially
those who have traditionally been left out or written off — we can win
Texas back by electing leaders who truly represent the people of this
state.

Keep the faith.

Beto

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/46921?refcode=ema20210903-152238&t=1021&akid=152238%2E444211%2E6c5joG ]Donate »

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1022&akid=152238%2E444211%2E6c5joG

name: Roger Misso
subject: What solidarity means to veterans this Labor Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
body:
Peter,

Solidarity is fundamentally about fairness. It's about justice. It's about fidelity to the person to your left and your right.

Solidarity is the core of the labor movement. It's also the core of military service. Solidarity binds the labor and veterans together. Today, more than 1.2 million veterans belong to a labor union.

But solidarity can't end outside the picket line or the union hall. [_**It has to extend all the way to the halls of Congress and to national public policy.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/AW5jRsgBozFIg5UMFzxmHUxppHDiFH6Ifyl6kK-cqjs=/BSb8FUt5j9qAdZhhquan_THZGjMPqAMeAGKCnK6SDos=)

Solidarity in public policy means raising the minimum wage, passing the PRO Act, and ending corporate dominance of labor law. [_**Solidarity in Congress means electing more workers and veterans of integrity to make that public policy a reality.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/AW5jRsgBozFIg5UMFzxmHUxppHDiFH6Ifyl6kK-cqjs=/BSb8FUt5j9qAdZhhquan_THZGjMPqAMeAGKCnK6SDos=)

This Labor Day and every day, Taking the Hill is proud to lead the movement to support and elect the next generation of veterans and workers who understand what solidarity is all about. When you're done chipping in to support your [_**local labor-serving organizations**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/AW5jRsgBozFIg5UMFzxmHUxppHDiFH6Ifyl6kK-cqjs=/Ra1q_u_7iSvrpEjKrmGJQIZ4lbbfizU4ITVsaoFFS_8=) , I hope you'll consider [_**supporting our important work at Taking the Hill with $5, $10, or more.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/AW5jRsgBozFIg5UMFzxmHUxppHDiFH6Ifyl6kK-cqjs=/BSb8FUt5j9qAdZhhquan_THZGjMPqAMeAGKCnK6SDos=) Every little bit helps!

Enjoy your long weekend. Remember all those who made it possible.

In solidarity,
Roger

_Roger Misso_
_Executive Director_
_Taking the Hill_
[_@RogerMissoCNY_](https://act.myngp.com/el/AW5jRsgBozFIg5UMFzxmHUxppHDiFH6Ifyl6kK-cqjs=/r0L1ixetD7jlQ2MdSZ-iUMUZdZ4E8k1p8jN--UjHd4I=)

To make a contribution, [click here](https://act.myngp.com/el/AW5jRsgBozFIg5UMFzxmHUxppHDiFH6Ifyl6kK-cqjs=/pjjQP5aETfSaQsCfxSuxtq-rSe7NYj8uPfrOFr2NX3U= "https://act.myngp.com/el/AW5jRsgBozFIg5UMFzxmHUxppHDiFH6Ifyl6kK-cqjs=/pjjQP5aETfSaQsCfxSuxtq-rSe7NYj8uPfrOFr2NX3U=").

name: Mark Takano
subject: Wildfires, hurricanes, flooding, blizzards
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
It will only get worse.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35180659/304286391/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNmZiZDMxZi0wZjBkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EElmdTd3w9x0lKRbtWmcwiFxQYaSPfftnu0_Sqhh_7Y=)
---
Peter, today marks the five-year anniversary of the United States ratifying the Paris Climate Agreement.

But since then, our country has faced worsening hurricanes, flooding, blizzards, and so much more.

**We’ve seen it right here in California, with raging wildfires that destroy forests and homes, threaten our air quality, and harm ecosystems.** _**And Peter, we’ve almost reached the point of no return:**_ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35180660/304286392/1924615817?refcode=MTFC_20210903_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNmZiZDMxZi0wZjBkLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EElmdTd3w9x0lKRbtWmcwiFxQYaSPfftnu0_Sqhh_7Y=&emci=00bad409-ef0c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=c6fbd31f-0f0d-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=18839602) Peter, it’s clear that we need to do more -- it’s why I’ve always championed the fight against climate change. But unfortunately, my colleagues on the other side of the aisle don’t seem to agree.

But since then, our country has faced worsening hurricanes, flooding, blizzards, and so much more. We’ve seen it right here in California, with raging wildfires that destroy forests and homes, threaten our air quality, and harm ecosystems. And Peter, we’ve almost reached the point of no return: Peter, it’s clear that we need to do more -- it’s why I’ve always championed the fight against climate change. I want to continue helping Nevadans become healthier and more prosperous long past 2022, and with your help, I can do that as governor. | | | | | In a race like this, every single donation matters. Your contribution could be the difference between reaching people across the state through digital ads and people not being aware of this important election. That’s why it’s absolutely essential my campaign meets its $4,000 goal. name: BREAKING NEWS UPDATE (via DCCC)
subject: President Biden under ATTACK?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
Do you CONDEMN Republicans for pushing LIES about the 2020 election and inciting political violence? | | | **CNN REPORT: **
**TOP TRUMP LOYALIST: "Anybody who tells you that Joe Biden was dutifully elected is lying to you."**

---
| ****One of Trump 's top loyalists just pushed disgusting lies about the 2020 election -- AGAIN.

_He even suggested another armed insurrection could be on the horizon._

We can't Republicans get away with their continued attacks on our democracy.

So we're calling on 10,000 grassroots Democrats to make their voices heard and let us know where they stand:**

Do you CONDEMN Republicans for pushing LIES about the 2020 election and inciting political violence?**
---
[YES! ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/_) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/V4_)
---|---|---

We're sick to our stomachs.

**Rep. Madison Cawthorn, one of Trump 's top loyalists, just pushed disgusting lies about the 2020 election AGAIN -- _and even suggested another armed insurrection could be on the horizon._**

It's appalling. But Kevin McCarthy and his House GOP leadership have REFUSED to even acknowledge these disgusting remarks.

There's no sugar-coating it: **Republicans cannot be trusted with power at this critical moment for our democracy.**

_**NOT**_ while they attack the right to vote across the country.

_**NOT**_ while they continue to push baseless lies about the 2020 election.

_**And NOT**_ while they continue to condone calls for political violence and armed insurrection.

But if we're to have any hope of stopping them and their dangerous attacks on our democracy, we'll need our grassroots team behind us every step of the way.

**So we 're calling on 10,000 grassroots Democrats to make their voices heard and let us know where they stand:**
**[Do you CONDEMN Madison Cawthorn, Donald Trump, and their Republicans for pushing LIES about the 2020 election and inciting political violence?](https://links.e.dccc.)**
| [YES! ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/_) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/V4_)
---|---|---

Thanks,

DCCC

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. name: Rob Secaur
subject: Weekly Update from the Campaign Trail
body:
Jane Timken for Ohio Update [](https://) Dear Peter, Starting with some fantastic events with former NYPD Commissioner Bernie Kerik across the state and rounding out the week by hearing from concerned parents about their children’s education, it was another great week for Jane’s grassroots, America First campaign. Jane continues to gain momentum on a daily basis as she crisscrosses the state, talking about the issues that are most important to voters in Ohio. I hope you’ll take a few minutes to learn more. **Back the Blue with Bernie Kerik** Last Saturday, hundreds of Ohioans joined Jane and former NYPD Commissioner Bernie Kerik for two Back the Blue rallies in Columbus and Youngstown. We were thrilled to have Commissioner Kerik proudly throw his support behind Jane’s candidacy. “In the beginning nobody wanted to go near him (Trump) in Ohio, they wanted nothing to do with him,” Kerik said. “Some of them are running for United States Senate. Only one person stood out and said, ‘I’m endorsing him. I’m going to fight for him and make sure he wins,’ and that’s Jane Timken. **I know all the players in the race, and there’s only one I would endorse.”** Saturday’s events came on the heels of last week’s Women for Jane launch with over 150 women from across the state. Momentum and enthusiasm continue to grow as Ohio conservatives rally around Jane Timken for U.S. Senate. **From the Trail** On Tuesday, Jane visited the Richland Pregnancy Center to tour their facility and meet with their dedicated staff who provide compassionate, pro-life care to moms, dads, and babies. Centers like this across Ohio and the country are helping to save lives and provide hope to families. Later that day, Jane had a great event with friends and supporters in Mansfield. Jane is ready to get to work, but it will take all of us to right the ship in Washington. [](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=92f318410d3048868c425f16aef4a3ba&_e=3m7OBvOwDZdPDFsmXrUdmrUv1jv8tuVbC21Q30DiEeGD1hKO0vMUTYSmSWW4JfWa6AFvVUbj-BcuSjXw0Vt3AyTxuKKGjCu5B1_Byl7Hyoaqgd0TNEgHmbzNMq-R017lNcMS0FcKiyOXWLlaIkrQwGE6ZZHe9qtOxtSq_Dmp3QUBWTCeXuLrYTnAxyyWiQpVQuk6JAVBHdn8aFpMEWNUlwz6HWaCVLWjh7dxDpSLtuRNZ2KWr8vYE3PrneZF7ao2XF7ZcfL1GI0etv4-1_FibbeJ89VfrUgYJUieNtU2Ud_VvS-JEXcUDiAELdURwlf5) On Wednesday night, Jane had a great evening with supporters in Springfield. It was great to see such great friends like former Congressman Steve Austria, Urbana Mayor Bill Bean, and State Central Committeeman Steve Bruns, and make so many new friends! Last night, Jane continued her statewide listening tour on Critical Race Theory and fighting back against the woke, liberal agenda in our schools. Parents from across the state have been sharing their stories and how they’re fighting for their children’s education. **Media Roundup** Last Friday, Jane sat down with One America News' Christina Bobb to talk about Joe Biden’s failed leadership and weakness as Commander in Chief. clean_body: Jane Timken for Ohio Update https:// Dear Peter, Starting with some fantastic events with former NYPD Commissioner Bernie Kerik across the state and rounding out the week by hearing from concerned parents about their children’s education, it was another great week for Jane’s grassroots, America First campaign. Jane continues to gain momentum on a daily basis as she crisscrosses the state, talking about the issues that are most important to voters in Ohio. I hope you’ll take a few minutes to learn more. Back the Blue with Bernie Kerik Last Saturday, hundreds of Ohioans joined Jane and former NYPD Commissioner Bernie Kerik for two Back the Blue rallies in Columbus and Youngstown. We were thrilled to have Commissioner Kerik proudly throw his support behind Jane’s candidacy. “In the beginning nobody wanted to go near him (Trump) in Ohio, they wanted nothing to do with him,” Kerik said. “Some of them are running for United States Senate. Only one person stood out and said, ‘I’m endorsing him. I’m going to fight for him and make sure he wins,’ and that’s Jane Timken. I know all the players in the race, and there’s only one I would endorse.” Saturday’s events came on the heels of last week’s Women for Jane launch with over 150 women from across the state. Momentum and enthusiasm continue to grow as Ohio conservatives rally around Jane Timken for U.S. Senate. From the Trail On Tuesday, Jane visited the Richland Pregnancy Center to tour their facility and meet with their dedicated staff who provide compassionate, pro-life care to moms, dads, and babies. Centers like this across Ohio and the country are helping to save lives and provide hope to families. Later that day, Jane had a great event with friends and supporters in Mansfield. Jane is ready to get to work, but it will take all of us to right the ship in Washington. On Wednesday night, Jane had a great evening with supporters in Springfield. It was great to see such great friends like former Congressman Steve Austria, Urbana Mayor Bill Bean, and State Central Committeeman Steve Bruns, and make so many new friends! Last night, Jane continued her statewide listening tour on Critical Race Theory and fighting back against the woke, liberal agenda in our schools. body:
If we lose more seats, it’ll only be worse

| [](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=bc678752a9de4264872c2a8f5b6486ea&_e=n3uw-GrLrEdjYYAGj4otHBtt6mpS5dbb2h54Z553eWwGCAJAOtOeA8Z9AE0kQV5_IZl0zPFxPb1rBbyTp6AGF5FeeZbp3THjDwtkYvZKkAHl_L5kDEEQGyuDlC79g1b8J4FFTG8BZXWUSMOOluRlK81UpqBa6uEK0e8OSBIqu6Y-cBXq0yjBbY3hOd1y6wnljS0QMKCW5OsAn5U7dwUEJqcO_IQhNSYZJr13JA2v0MjJHOowtNdutW-OHkpPp4nQpZijpmwy4xLE-fGtQO3VcRfSojOhmE0t_VZr_jLItVb0FGd4C1dufKonTqdvTn0Vfzj3E10sTKmMC5JZDt1TLgLFXwN0cT9SVcfSdT1YLxSizqW4z4q5iyBIQPLmreWBlRYpu7UdbhoU8h7UKpm-NRGJ03a2CP01u5BxdE4X3iSUiZnxwDx6qEzLV2H8SdU8sdUl8kQT_h7nWXSzyUOrXxUQMWP0bP9dpDedqN0FAcaS4vqSuX0Qb9_f8Myn5NdlsXsaPDdxwAuqUIr6JdCyGvDPWIbG5TNBoiFxGkE2CkM%3D)
---

Friend,

While Democrats have control of the House, they will work to advance their socialist policies: **tax us into oblivion, raise the national debt, impose critical race theory, open our borders, and force you to fund Medicare for all and abortion on demand.** Meanwhile, Republicans are working for conservative principles and policies that will help American families and give them freedom.

The only way we can do this is if we take back the House next year and keep Nancy Pelosi from maintaining her socialist grip on our nation.
| [**DONATE HERE TO TAKE BACK THE HOUSE**](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=bc678752a9de4264872c2a8f5b6486ea&_e=n3uw-GrLrEdjYYAGj4otHBtt6mpS5dbb2h54Z553eWwGCAJAOtOeA8Z9AE0kQV5_IZl0zPFxPb1rBbyTp6AGF5FeeZbp3THjDwtkYvZKkAHl_L5kDEEQGyuDlC79g1b8J4FFTG8BZXWUSMOOluRlK81UpqBa6uEK0e8OSBIqu6Y-cBXq0yjBbY3hOd1y6wnljS0QMKCW5OsAn5U7dwUEJqcO_IQhNSYZJr13JA2v0MjJHOowtNdutW-OHkpPp4nQpZijpmwy4xLE-fGtQO3VcRfSojOhmE0t_VZr_jLItVb0FGd4C1dufKonTqdvTn0Vfzj3E10sTKmMC5JZDt1TLlqTUzZyKXr1U2wMNx8uSD10mqOwBOiulVjvBGOtCWm7Y_liOPhLYgX3whPob_qIIP6IcXhwnTT1lQO51epnGxug8DSPREyV3v8gEDot5F7rcgLAjwtunEbB09g_TdcuEet59Gkc2RP8sXkAXZgL9gX6tDxjwX4rOhb_bMVk4CupdGDfoG1TaX1jwsfyFgtVw8rXS0fq4UgWPwIhG0fi7LM%3D)
---

Since Joe Biden and his Democrat friends have come into power, we’ve faced rising prices across the country, trillion-dollar “infrastructure” bills, and an assault on our liberties. **If we lose more seats in the House, it’ll only be worse.** We’ve got to stand up to Pelosi’s poor policies and her “my way or the highway” mentality if we’re going to Take Back the House and save America from a socialist fate.

It’s crucial that we Take Back the House. We need to implement pro-business, pro-growth, and pro-America policies if we’re going to maintain conservative values and protect the American dream.
[**CHIP IN HERE TO TAKE BACK THE HOUSE**](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=bc678752a9de4264872c2a8f5b6486ea&_e=n3uw-GrLrEdjYYAGj4otHBtt6mpS5dbb2h54Z553eWwGCAJAOtOeA8Z9AE0kQV5_IZl0zPFxPb1rBbyTp6AGF5FeeZbp3THjDwtkYvZKkAHl_L5kDEEQGyuDlC79g1b8J4FFTG8BZXWUSMOOluRlK81UpqBa6uEK0e8OSBIqu6Y-cBXq0yjBbY3hOd1y6wnljS0QMKCW5OsAn5U7dwUEJqcO_IQhNSYZJr13JA2v0MjJHOowtNdutW-OHkpPp4nQpZijpmwy4xLE-fGtQO3VcRfSojOhmE0t_VZr_jLItVb0FGd4C1dufKonTqdvTn0Vfzj3E10sTKmMC5JZDt1TLnAGpJSOIxhLLrVXI80MdMC5rxa7oDgZuNifBfE-tq31tdvwB11yoYTyzloYhRWsXNs0J9OLP_oedevSs9s-pX2FNVX4qPSj-WOT0IWKSJShSkcmNmlgjd6KMDaWp8FqhQqvirRS5JXzekFIy-cHPzc6lK5yyVBiOHVXrORfZBuGbViqzafckLhLhRZ_33Lg3YysfqxSC9iJVooasVTr8N8%3D)
---

We need more conservative leaders in the House to stand up to Nancy Pelosi and her radical cronies, but they’ve got to have the support of strong Republicans across the nation.

**_[Will you help us Take Back the House?](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=bc678752a9de4264872c2a8f5b6486ea&_e=n3uw-GrLrEdjYYAGj4otHBtt6mpS5dbb2h54Z553eWwGCAJAOtOeA8Z9AE0kQV5_IZl0zPFxPb1rBbyTp6AGF5FeeZbp3THjDwtkYvZKkAHl_L5kDEEQGyuDlC79g1b8J4FFTG8BZXWUSMOOluRlK81UpqBa6uEK0e8OSBIqu6Y-cBXq0yjBbY3hOd1y6wnljS0QMKCW5OsAn5U7dwUEJqcO_IQhNSYZJr13JA2v0MjJHOowtNdutW-OHkpPp4nQpZijpmwy4xLE-fGtQO3VcRfSojOhmE0t_VZr_jLItVb0FGd4C1dufKonTqdvTn0Vfzj3E10sTKmMC5JZDt1TLkRXbng5_KyAMFaMo49azYgYHi6Y7aiQwReDSCAsfXU84PsdfT7rY6_dJyaW7f7XEtAu28EYaLm1kaIWo9eihcSEDFhkIKWxt5Ew4wTSO3P7oJ-XrWdlTKc3KL_qxdtFL7JCA8BPWn5bZj7b7_UtyIl3JQwkdQWmpV27WTP0Y0mYzEhqX2n69A0lujKmUoWPeuyE_aAu31CqPNkrd-G9NBk%3D)_**

Thank you,

[](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=bc678752a9de4264872c2a8f5b6486ea&_e=n3uw-GrLrEdjYYAGj4otHBtt6mpS5dbb2h54Z553eWwGCAJAOtOeA8Z9AE0kQV5_IZl0zPFxPb1rBbyTp6AGF5FeeZbp3THjDwtkYvZKkAHl_L5kDEEQGyuDlC79g1b8J4FFTG8BZXWUSMOOluRlK81UpqBa6uEK0e8OSBIqu6Y-cBXq0yjBbY3hOd1y6wnljS0QMKCW5OsAn5U7dwUEJqcO_IQhNSYZJr13JA2v0MjJHOowtNdutW-OHkpPp4nQpZijpmwy4xLE-fGtQO3VcRfSojOhmE0t_VZr_jLItVb0FGd4C1dufKonTqdvTn0Vfzj3E10sTKmMC5JZDt1TLkz1eoSdr4hCkTZq79nRfoXARzJh9WELk0s5rO2FsVFr9kzv_tcwsQDCoGRCBVxVFYZmlEUxBRN8OAi5VrMDfXsjtVLAJIX4_HHwAsMnOBy90i8JfWXPFhXaS1z9-ms02kssJzqMoR2Zlc0FUslf2_EIrB3-TA0b9bYTj63PQ8WOAYY-eu0K9bZJ6im-HlcV-YlS0XlFOvDeXQuoPiFrc3c%3D)

| **Weekly Newsletter ******
---
_**Note from Chairman Stepanek **_**_Weekly Governor's Glance _****_Upcoming Events _****_House Republican Update _****_Senate Republican Update _****_Republican Spotlight_**** _Noteworthy News_**** _NHGOP Tweets _
****NH Federation of Republican Women****NH Young Republicans****NH Federation of College Republicans**** **
---
|
---
| **Derek**
**
This past week the NHGOP was lucky enough to host two phenomenal surrogates in the Granite State! Congresswoman Kat Cammack from Florida joined in on several events over the weekend including the Goffstown GOP meeting, NHYR Pig Roast, and Seacoast Chili Fest. The Congresswoman was a welcomed guest, and we appreciate her encouragement of youth leaders within our Republican party, along with female political empowerment.

Later in the week, we hosted Secretary Mike Pompeo! Secretary Pompeo also made several stops in New Hampshire, advocating for school choice and even stopping at Bedford’s Simply Delicious Baking Co. to promote Candidate Linda Camarota! Here in New Hampshire, we are lucky to have Republican support from all across the United States, even in a local election such as the Bedford Special.

Speaking of which, Bedford’s Special Election is this Tuesday, and anyone that can pitch in to ensure this House Seat remains Republican would be greatly appreciated. If you are able to join the NHGOP tomorrow to talk to voters, please stop by Simply Delicious in Bedford at 9 am to be set up with a canvassing account. If you are not free tomorrow, join Camarota’s team on Election Day to ensure all Republican voters get out to submit their ballot. To help out on Tuesday, sign up **[**HERE**](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fforms.gle%2FaGiiEF2gxjxZjBEP9/1/0100017badac39f4-10f89da4-3b19-4b05-adaf-db234a325aaa-000000/Xy6dkXXKGmrneSwRIAXFqf3rF_I=234)**. **

| **Stephan Stepanek
NHGOP Chairman **

| **The New Hampshire Federation of College Republicans is the officially chartered state organization for College Republicans all over the state of New Hampshire. With chapters at Saint Anselm College, Plymouth State, UNH, SNHU, Dartmouth, Franklin Pierce, and Keene State, the NHFCR has representation for a wide swath of the state. Executive board members include Chairman Ben Mickens, Executive Director Joseph LaCreta, Vice-Chair for CD1 Nate Twarog, Vice-Chair for CD2 John Michitson, Treasurer Kevin Chrisom, and Secretary Jessica Long. Our chapters are driven to keep college students engaged with conservative politics by bringing speakers to campus, presenting students with conservative internship opportunities in the state, and doing grassroots campaigning. The Federation board looks forward to helping get our chapters to a post-COVID reality while we work to keep Republican leadership in Concord as we push for Republican leadership in DC. **

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Burchett for Congress**
body:
TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country. [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=0c27d1b943a84a7793039345e058cdad&_e=x_Pael4Fx3m3KtNVhXzhNB-xzioxNSB-6eBYl0a21aKjcfupFqT5g311A5grxyyUgl1eqA29OeARZnepMTL_P2ma1JCve5eFsXqqBh33y8AHzCDVzc_wHFKQuYZYFSFPRMNDnqTsnJOhfub9V-wtSTv_lgSB1EJ4CZBApGvgwq189JApnkDWUMGmnUR4ipQp0Q6dGd7oYrM8gn5uaPV9hlt8IeAEMjx7gfedWtXvPYNesuP0EstkcR7PD4vLT9sJwGnfhmSNULqm0kImoULnmoLd7v95z6c9KaQFzadpktg%3D) | |
---
**Say Their Names, Speaker Pelosi 🗣**
_A handover ceremony as U.S. troops prepare to leave Afghanistan_
_Image courtesy of the Associated Press _

It’s bad enough that the Biden administration stranded thousands of Americans in Kabul in a disaster that ended up killing 13 U.S. service members. That didn’t stop Speaker Pelosi from playing politics.

This week, my fellow Republican colleagues wanted to [honor our fallen heroes](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=0c27d1b943a84a7793039345e058cdad&_e=x_Pael4Fx3m3KtNVhXzhNBnRn-Es5EMTjZnqi7ES95DRAxybo4oR8uR7sxsdcCao56_jQpTaUupzWeTfQzWBVNqNRyAPnSg6lrWcgFtWghTazPXKS5zMwoujFyXIqWERg_Ok3btZaHE6YypMp-3FKeAA4JfPQ38jSAGnmCNvhkYjYZDTeophpsiPxOT-lJWddumRwWRfe9iJpYAYdvkkU1LNMDGeLzDUG27T1qPRfcoMEA0y9Z5kFLO4ddHMyBD059Yxioj-RyBsm1JSVX5BAf1sukk6-dSyXJbOFye28bajY_1qPzFau2vJflaDj0JW2qMfEmU1XnHrd0870A-ZimPDrKtdsxtdBQUB9HopNfRbGyel79hyz4tGy5sy1h7X) by reading their names on the House floor. Democrats’ response? They refused to recognize my colleagues and shut the House down.

It’s not a secret that Democrats are running as fast as they can from the tragedy in Afghanistan, but our fallen soldiers deserve to be recognized. [We will always remember the men and women](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=0c27d1b943a84a7793039345e058cdad&_e=x_Pael4Fx3m3KtNVhXzhNP0pmDUKk8Ni4liMnDV9P9Qs7NQTRYlK6Kd8I3ZYuinGN-wcc_HeFvUyPC5R_F3kTGIVwz3HS1SshIElz0yQlzYoOaI-NJQzflmokmDs77IMqp0iMbLico_iwX2oSjkjgW9hJmPUUekkO7pVlBZUYOUOl4_Ikog7YG7UdGNfM4SuOVg8d7dZg8PI2xqOPUfYwWU-8PO4lW3RtSpBFim9H-MA4HcSTyHSFsm-CdDo-aMzLigK1XDwxpqRsSsK-5KyNdRKjU4dqGaWANBhjMMxTqqWgkymFIx2bY8Dyqc8E3GCfRjC4_Hyxke_rHOv8QwxukYmLM_TLAS1pkXGxS87al9zWVd9swheXFclzkwMkhyL) who lost their lives in Kabul. And to Nancy Pelosi and my Democrat colleagues, I have only one thing to say: **Say their names.**
* Marine Corps Staff Sgt. Darin T. Hoover, 31, of Salt Lake City, Utah
* Marine Corps Sgt. Johanny Rosariopichardo, 25, of Lawrence, Massachusetts
* Marine Corps Sgt. Nicole L. Gee, 23, of Sacramento, California
* Marine Corps Cpl. Hunter Lopez, 22, of Indio, California
* Marine Corps Cpl. Daegan W. Page, 23, of Omaha, Nebraska
* Marine Corps Cpl. Humberto A. Sanchez, 22, of Logansport, Indiana
* Marine Corps Lance Cpl. David L. Espinoza, 20, of Rio Bravo, Texas
* Marine Corps Lance Cpl. Jared M. Schmitz, 20, of St. Charles, Missouri
* Marine Corps Lance Cpl. Rylee J. McCollum, 20, of Jackson, Wyoming
* Marine Corps Lance Cpl. Dylan R. Merola, 20, of Rancho Cucamonga, California
* Marine Corps Lance Cpl. Kareem M. Nikoui, 20, of Norco, California
* Navy Hospitalman Maxton W. Soviak, 22, of Berlin Heights, Ohio
* Army Staff Sgt. Ryan C. Knauss, 23, of Corryton, Tennessee

|
---
**The Volunteer State Volunteers 👏 **
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=0c27d1b943a84a7793039345e058cdad&_e=x_Pael4Fx3m3KtNVhXzhNBk_rPoL-QMzk5U4wDpSLuXNkh04QR6zvWCbaa7tFMPySo6XogYPhweIDmDfls-gj8mNl_Y4LMhS5iS-JlUF1NfBG3_0tsdrOorS99sVF_kHPJrwYwbXWWftuHVO4dfyxKsbUwbOhSa505LihSV25l788WgOrfp-S1x_JOL-fkF_Mp3t6CPuxUIp2bMUX-p9nwJGk1ae7avby75ohmYVfITLsNUzuMeJmmssGM-WrdXNx0ZdG3lPFTaUskLmeQEYfHlscXVmyWBf1u_y73J5qkJWKqV7XYn5jSK3BGzousPYrQN3VLpPo-uVF9u033jRpT4zI7Y3Z1M6nqPsnggQWR1H1o-JY18tkEuAWHVCaKMf)
Stories like this make us so proud to be Tennesseans. [Julia Short](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=0c27d1b943a84a7793039345e058cdad&_e=x_Pael4Fx3m3KtNVhXzhNBk_rPoL-QMzk5U4wDpSLuXNkh04QR6zvWCbaa7tFMPySo6XogYPhweIDmDfls-gj8mNl_Y4LMhS5iS-JlUF1NfBG3_0tsdrOorS99sVF_kHPJrwYwbXWWftuHVO4dfyxEp74_HZf_AYAB6_07hOa5WvaZTGSm2i1y7fZE-T48wkWXnN4mcrdvLt8XabOhG0H-zJemOPsmw_vyDn62eRAqOMD5BU_unpn2P2aHRr-Qz83H2T9_4wk6c9E4tuLK7N_J-LWpa0KXTskHlvjSF0iBd6XeICwPshCQKV42NKBX6f1_OIoCJcHDmkzNn7DvnOE5g46KBhTr2QPqMcNS_LWm0_0WyGcLnsdDKkz6vIG3sL), an Eastern Tennessee mom, watched the devastation from Hurricane Ida in Louisiana and knew she wanted to help. So she packed up her car and is getting ready to make the nine hour drive to Louisiana. It’s people like Julia who inspire us to live up to our state's title as the Volunteer State.
|
---

clean_body: TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country. | | Say Their Names, Speaker Pelosi 🗣 A handover ceremony as U.S. troops prepare to leave Afghanistan Image courtesy of the Associated Press It’s bad enough that the Biden administration stranded thousands of Americans in Kabul in a disaster that ended up killing 13 U.S. service members. That didn’t stop Speaker Pelosi from playing politics. This week, my fellow Republican colleagues wanted to by reading their names on the House floor. Democrats’ response? They refused to recognize my colleagues and shut the House down. It’s not a secret that Democrats are running as fast as they can from the tragedy in Afghanistan, but our fallen soldiers deserve to be recognized. who lost their lives in Kabul. And to Nancy Pelosi and my Democrat colleagues, I have only one thing to say: Say their names. Marine Corps Staff Sgt. Darin T. Hoover, 31, of Salt Lake City, Utah Marine Corps Sgt. Johanny Rosariopichardo, 25, of Lawrence, Massachusetts Marine Corps Sgt. Nicole L. Gee, 23, of Sacramento, California Marine Corps Cpl. Hunter Lopez, 22, of Indio, California Marine Corps Cpl. Daegan W. Page, 23, of Omaha, Nebraska Marine Corps Cpl. Humberto A. Sanchez, 22, of Logansport, Indiana Marine Corps Lance Cpl. David L. Espinoza, 20, of Rio Bravo, Texas Marine Corps Lance Cpl. Jared M. Schmitz, 20, of St. Charles, Missouri Marine Corps Lance Cpl. Rylee J. McCollum, 20, of Jackson, Wyoming Marine Corps Lance Cpl. Dylan R. Anti-abortion laws could be coming to Florida
| [ ](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/117?t=1&akid=492%2E564421%2Eg1ti6t)
---
Team -- You may have heard: Texas just passed one of the most restrictive, anti-abortion laws ever.

**Now, a similar law is coming to a state near you:_Florida._** [](https://act.ronbegone.com/survey/PET20210903_abortion/?refcode=RBG_20210903_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&t=7&akid=492%2E564421%2Eg1ti6t) [Listen up -- if we don’t put the pressure on DeSantis NOW, we know he’ll cave to MAGA extremists. We need 10,000 strong Democrats to sign our petition and tell DeSantis to stop the anti-choice attack on women’s bodies! »](https://act.ronbegone.com/survey/PET20210903_abortion/?refcode=RBG_20210903_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&t=8&akid=492%2E564421%2Eg1ti6t) | [SIGN IMMEDIATELY »](https://act.ronbegone.com/survey/PET20210903_abortion/?refcode=RBG_20210903_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&t=9&akid=492%2E564421%2Eg1ti6t)
---
The thing is DeSantis is already vulnerable. He’s behind in some of the polls and he can’t afford to lose more points.

If we can show him how much public opposition there is to a Texas-style anti-abortion bill, he might listen!

_**That’s why it’s critical that we turn up the pressure quickly.**_

[We need you -- sign the petition to stop Florida from passing the next anti-abortion bill »](https://act.ronbegone.com/survey/PET20210903_abortion/?refcode=RBG_20210903_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&t=10&akid=492%2E564421%2Eg1ti6t)

Team Ron Be Gone

Donald J. Trump September 2nd, 2021
Endorsement of Burt Jones
State Senator Burt Jones is a Conservative warrior running for Lieutenant Governor of Georgia. No one has fought harder for Election Integrity than Burt, and no state needs it more. name: Culp for Congress
subject: Ted Nugent Has a Message For You
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CULP FOR CONGRESS
body:
View online [https://app.getresponse.com/view.html?x=a62b&m=BwJzyq&mc=rR&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=E9s3FGR&]

[https://m.gr-cdn-6.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/8b0c0703-e9c4-4e80-b955-cfb3caaf2ad5.jpg]

Ted Nugent Endorses Loren Culp for Congress

[https://m.gr-cdn-6.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/721348e3-c57a-425a-8a26-edb52dc7f5d1.jpg] [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SKFloA&mc=rR&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=Et7qhcp&]

Today, I was honored to receive the endorsement of legendary rock-n-roll superstar Ted Nugent. Ted is a well-known and extremely outspoken supporter of the Constitution and of the America First movement. He also authored the Forward to my #1 bestselling book, American Cop.

I am honored to have his support.

Our movement--the We the Peoplemovement--is gaining a lot of steam and ramping up in Washington's 4th Congressional District. Last month was our largest fundraising month yet with almost 95% of the contributions coming into the campaign from the 4th Congressional District and over 99% of the support coming from within Washington State.

This is our final month of the 3rd quarter and as we head into the 4th quarter it is imperative that we continue to grow our base of support and expand our financial lead among in-state contributors.

We have $27,847 left to raise in the month of September. We will raise that money--our team is hard at work looking for opportunities to get into the community and to spread our message of individual freedom and liberty and Constitutional governance.

Thank you all so much for your support. You have no idea how deep your love, prayers, and support have touched me, my lovely wife Barb, and my family.

Humbled and grateful.

Loren

With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress?
